title: Meta-LegNet: A Transferable and Interpretable Framework for Surface Adsorption Prediction via Self-Defined Adsorption-Environment Learning
abstract: A central challenge in computational catalysis is the identification of low-energy and chemically plausible adsorption configurations, as these directly affect adsorption energies, reaction pathways, and catalytic performance. Existing approaches generally rely on enumerating candidate adsorption sites followed by iterative refinement through density functional theory calculations or machine-learning-based relaxations. However, such workflows remain computationally expensive and are difficult to scale to complex surfaces or multi-adsorbate systems. Here, we introduce Meta-LegNet, a graph learning framework that combines SE(3)-equivariant atom-level message passing with voxel-based multiscale aggregation and cross-domain meta-learning to learn transferable representations of local adsorption environments across diverse catalyst--adsorbate systems. Rather than following a conventional regression-only paradigm, Meta-LegNet encodes local chemical environments using invariant radial features and equivariant directional information, and further incorporates broader structural context through coordinate-frame voxel pooling, assignment-based upsampling, and gated feature fusion. The resulting local-global decomposition produces atom-resolved attribution maps, which are processed to identify adsorption-relevant local environments in an interpretable manner. Based on the learned representations, we further construct an adsorption-environment database and develop a template-matching strategy to propose likely adsorption sites on previously unexplored surfaces without exhaustive site enumeration. Overall, our results suggest that learning transferable adsorption environments provides an accurate, interpretable, and practical route for accelerating catalyst screening.
summary:
计算催化的一个核心挑战是识别低能量且化学上合理的吸附构型，因为这些构型直接影响吸附能、反应途径和催化性能。现有方法通常依赖于枚举候选吸附位点，然后通过密度泛函理论计算或基于机器学习的松弛进行迭代细化。然而，此类工作流程的计算成本仍然很高，并且难以扩展到复杂的表面或多吸附物系统。在这里，我们介绍 Meta-LegNet，这是一种图学习框架，它将 SE(3) 等变原子级消息传递与基于体素的多尺度聚合和跨域元学习相结合，以学习跨不同催化剂-吸附物系统的局部吸附环境的可转移表示。 Meta-LegNet 没有遵循传统的仅回归范式，而是使用不变的径向特征和等变的方向信息对局部化学环境进行编码，并通过坐标系体素池、基于分配的上采样和门控特征融合进一步合并更广泛的结构上下文。

由此产生的局部-全局分解产生原子解析的归因图，对其进行处理以以可解释的方式识别与吸附相关的局部环境。基于学习到的表示，我们进一步构建了吸附环境数据库并开发了模板匹配策略，以在先前未探索的表面上提出可能的吸附位点，而无需详尽的位点枚举。总的来说，我们的结果表明，学习可转移的吸附环境为加速催化剂筛选提供了准确、可解释且实用的途径。

title: Polyamorphism in Glassy Network Materials
abstract: One dramatic feature of network liquids is the emergence at low temperatures and high pressures of polyamorphism, where multiple distinct liquid phases are accessed in a single material. Polyamorphism can arise from the competition between distinct local inherent structures corresponding to bonded and nonbonded ordering. Thermal bond breaking thus can lead to a phase transition often accompanied by thermodynamic anomalies away from the transition itself, such as the familiar density maximum in water at atmospheric pressure and $4^\circ$ C. Water exhibits network interactions in the form of hydrogen bonding between water molecules. The polyamorphic transition in water, however, is difficult to study due to the rapid crystallization of supercooled water and due to glassy effects at low temperatures. In the present work, we propose a simple microscopic model where the glassy and thermodynamic properties are both calculated directly from the microscopic potentials. The model contains a liquid-liquid phase transition, which, after tuning the microscopic parameters, may be located either above, near, or below the glass transition. By applying the Random First Order Transition theory of the glass transition to this simple microscopic model, we shine light on the interplay of polyamorphism and glassy properties in network liquids. We show the connection between the thermodynamic water-like anomalies and corresponding anomalies in the glassy kinetics. The analysis unveils key details on the way glassy dynamics modifies the phase transition kinetics. When the parameters of the model are tuned to produce a phase diagram resembling that of water, the liquid-liquid phase transformation near $T_g$ occurs via ``nanonucleation'', resulting in extremely small domains sizes and nonclassical nucleation kinetics which are predicted from the RFOT theory.
summary:
网络液体的一个显着特征是在低温和高压下出现多晶现象，即在单一材料中获得多个不同的液相。多态性可能是由于对应于键合和非键合排序的不同局部固有结构之间的竞争而产生的。因此，热键断裂会导致相变，通常伴随着远离相变本身的热力学异常，例如在大气压和$4^\circ$C下水中常见的密度最大值。水以水分子之间氢键的形式表现出网络相互作用。然而，由于过冷水的快速结晶和低温下的玻璃态效应，水中的多无定形转变很难研究。在目前的工作中，我们提出了一个简单的微观模型，其中玻璃态和热力学性质都是直接从微观势计算的。该模型包含液-液相变，在调整微观参数后，该相变可能位于玻璃化转变之上、附近或之下。

通过将玻璃化转变的随机一阶转变理论应用于这个简单的微观模型，我们揭示了网络液体中多晶性和玻璃态特性的相互作用。我们展示了热力学类水异常与玻璃态动力学中相应异常之间的联系。该分析揭示了玻璃态动力学改变相变动力学方式的关键细节。当调整模型参数以产生类似于水的相图时，$T_g$ 附近的液-液相变通过“纳米成核”发生，从而产生极小的域尺寸和根据 RFOT 理论预测的非经典成核动力学。

title: An extended ab initio theory of the V$_{\text{B}}^-$ center in hBN: excited states, Jahn-Teller distortion, and pressure dependence
abstract: Ensembles of negatively charged boron vacancy (V$_{\text{B}}^-$) centers in hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) have emerged as a two-dimensional spin qubit system interfaced with optics to advance nanoscale quantum sensing. However, a comprehensive description of its optically detected magnetic resonance (ODMR) signal remains challenging due to the strongly correlated nature of the excited electronic states involved in its optical cycle. In this work, we model the energetics, structural relaxation, and transition rates of the V$_{\text{B}}^-$ center using a high-level wave-function-based electron correlation method (CASSCF-NEVPT2). We provide a thorough analysis of the excited state fine structure and pseudo Jahn-Teller effects, singlet-triplet quasi-degeneracies, photoluminescence parameters, intersystem crossing pathways, and stress-dependence of the fine structure and decay parameters. Our findings not only clarify the fundamental behavior of the V$_{\text{B}}^-$ center in hBN but also establish the theoretical foundation for advancing the V$_{\text{B}}^-$ center's readout for integrated 2D quantum sensors.
summary: 六方氮化硼 (hBN) 中带负电的硼空位 (V$_{\text{B}}^-$) 中心的集合已成为与光学接口的二维自旋量子位系统，以推进纳米级量子传感。然而，由于其光学循环中所涉及的激发电子态的强相关性，对其光学检测到的磁共振（ODMR）信号的全面描述仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们使用基于高级波函数的电子相关方法 (CASSCF-NEVPT2) 对 V$_{\text{B}}^-$ 中心的能量、结构弛豫和跃迁速率进行建模。我们对激发态精细结构和伪 Jahn-Teller 效应、单重态-三重态准简并性、光致发光参数、系间交叉路径以及精细结构和衰变参数的应力依赖性进行了全面分析。我们的研究结果不仅阐明了 hBN 中 V$_{\text{B}}^-$ 中心的基本行为，而且为推进 V$_{\text{B}}^-$ 中心在集成二维量子传感器中的读出奠定了理论基础。

title: Comment on "The elusive fluid-and-crystal coexistence state in simulations of monodisperse, hard-sphere colloids"
abstract: In a recent article [J. G. Wang, U. Dhumal, M. E. Zakhari, and R. N. Zia, AIChE Journal 72, e70275 (2026).], the authors discuss the absence of simulations of monodisperse hard spheres in which a metastable fluid spontaneously nucleates into a stable fluid-crystal coexistence. Here, we show that such a simulation can be readily accomplished with standard simulation methods.
summary: 在最近的一篇文章中 [J. G. Wang、U. Dhumal、M. E. Zakhari 和 R. N. Zia，AIChE Journal 72, e70275 (2026).]，作者讨论了缺乏对单分散硬球的模拟，其中亚稳态流体自发成核成稳定的流体-晶体共存。在这里，我们表明可以使用标准模拟方法轻松完成此类模拟。

title: Pattern Formation and Stick-Slip Dynamics in Binary Particle Assemblies with Rotating Drives
abstract: We numerically examine a binary system of particles with repulsive interactions, where one species is driven by a rotating drive and the other is subjected either to a constant drive in a fixed direction or to a rotating drive that is out of phase with the first species. As a function of rotation frequency, we find a variety of order-disorder transitions and pattern forming states, including density-modulated stripes, partially jammed states, phase separated fluids, and mixed fluids. When one species has a constant drive and the drive on the other species is rotated at low frequencies, the system switches between different pattern forming phase-separated lanes including density-modulated stripes and partially jammed states, similar to what is observed for oppositely driven colloids. The lanes tend to align with the net direction of rotation, resulting in a series of order-disorder switching transitions. The transport curves show abrupt jumps up or down at the transitions, which also correspond with changes in the topological order. We find similar switching transitions when both species rotate out of phase with each other. For intermediate driving frequencies, the system becomes increasingly fluid-like and the laning behavior is lost. At high frequencies, however, the system can again exhibit patterned flow when the rotation orbits become smaller than the average spacing between particles. The switching is reduced when a finite temperature is included, but even for temperatures at which the uniform equilibrium bulk system is liquid, the partially jammed state can generate local density enhancements that lead to recrystallization. We demonstrate the pattern switching behavior for systems with different screened repulsive interaction potentials.
summary:
我们对具有排斥相互作用的粒子二元系统进行数值研究，其中一个物质由旋转驱动器驱动，另一个物质要么受到固定方向的恒定驱动，要么受到与第一个物质异相的旋转驱动。作为旋转频率的函数，我们发现了各种有序-无序转变和图案形成状态，包括密度调制条纹、部分堵塞状态、相分离流体和混合流体。当一种物质具有恒定驱动力并且另一种物质上的驱动力以低频旋转时，系统在形成相分离通道的不同图案之间切换，包括密度调制条纹和部分堵塞状态，类似于在相反驱动的胶体中观察到的情况。车道倾向于与旋转的净方向对齐，从而导致一系列有序-无序切换转换。传输曲线显示在过渡处突然向上或向下跳跃，这也与拓扑顺序的变化相对应。当两种物质彼此异相旋转时，我们发现类似的转换转变。

对于中间驾驶频率，系统变得越来越流畅，并且车道行为消失。然而，在高频下，当旋转轨道变得小于颗粒之间的平均间距时，系统可以再次表现出图案化的流动。当包含有限温度时，切换会减少，但即使对于均匀平衡体系统为液体的温度，部分堵塞状态也会产生导致再结晶的局部密度增强。我们演示了具有不同筛选排斥相互作用势的系统的模式切换行为。

title: Random sampling of self-avoiding theta-graphs
abstract: Theta-graphs are a type of spatial graph with two vertices connected by three edges. We investigate embeddings of theta-graphs in the square and simple cubic lattices, using a combination of the Wang-Landau Monte Carlo method with a variant of the BFACF algorithm which accommodates vertices of degree 3. This allows us to estimate the critical exponents governing the number of theta-graphs and the distributions of the different arm-lengths. For the cubic lattice these values can be compared to the corresponding exponents for prime knots. We also study the number of `monodisperse' theta-graphs where the three arms have the same lengths, and find evidence supporting a conjecture for the critical exponent in two dimensions.
summary: Theta 图是一种空间图，具有由三个边连接的两个顶点。我们使用 Wang-Landau 蒙特卡洛方法与 BFACF 算法的变体（可容纳 3 阶顶点）相结合，研究了 theta 图在方格和简单立方晶格中的嵌入。这使我们能够估计控制 theta 图数量和不同臂长分布的临界指数。对于立方晶格，这些值可以与素结的相应指数进行比较。我们还研究了三个臂具有相同长度的“单分散”theta 图的数量，并找到支持二维临界指数猜想的证据。

title: Stability and dynamics of dark-bright solitons in spin-orbit- and Rabi-coupled binary Bose-Einstein condensates
abstract: We investigate the stability and nonlinear dynamics of dark-bright solitons in a one-dimensional binary Bose-Einstein condensate subjected to synthetic spin-orbit and Rabi couplings. In the absence of spin-orbit coupling, we map the coupled Gross-Pitaevskii equations onto the integrable Manakov model and obtain exact dark-bright soliton solutions, providing a rigorous theoretical benchmark. We demonstrate that finite spin-orbit coupling breaks integrability by inducing spin-dependent phase gradients, which result in spatial separation of the spin components and the emergence of intrinsic density oscillations. By contrast, Rabi coupling enforces phase locking between components and supports robust breather-like excitations. Using imaginary-time propagation together with Bogoliubov-de Gennes analysis, we systematically characterise ground-state phases and excitation spectra for both symmetric and asymmetric interaction regimes in homogeneous and harmonically trapped systems. Real-time simulations further demonstrate that finite gauge fields and interaction quenches drive the system far from equilibrium, giving rise to diverse nonlinear phenomena, including multi-soliton fragmentation, breathing stripe patterns, and soliton dynamics. Our results highlight the interplay of synthetic gauge fields, external confinement, and interaction engineering as powerful tools for controlling the stability and dynamical behaviour of nonlinear excitations in multicomponent quantum gases.
summary:
我们研究了经过合成自旋轨道和拉比耦合的一维二元玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体中暗-亮孤子的稳定性和非线性动力学。在没有自旋轨道耦合的情况下，我们将耦合的 Gross-Pitaevskii 方程映射到可积马纳科夫模型上，并获得精确的暗-亮孤子解，提供严格的理论基准。我们证明，有限自旋轨道耦合通过引入自旋相关的相位梯度来破坏可积性，从而导致自旋分量的空间分离和本征密度振荡的出现。相比之下，拉比耦合强制组件之间的锁相，并支持稳健的呼吸式激励。利用虚时间传播和 Bogoliubov-de Gennes 分析，我们系统地表征了均匀和谐波俘获系统中对称和不对称相互作用状态的基态相位和激发光谱。

实时模拟进一步表明，有限规范场和相互作用猝灭使系统远离平衡，从而产生多种非线性现象，包括多孤子碎片、呼吸条纹模式和孤子动力学。我们的结果强调了合成规范场、外部约束和相互作用工程的相互作用，作为控制多组分量子气体中非线性激发的稳定性和动态行为的强大工具。

title: Finite-size scaling properties of classical random walk on various two-dimensional lattices
abstract: We consider various two-dimensional lattices such as square, Kagome, Lieb, honeycomb, dice lattices of finite extent, to study the effect of lattice profile in terms of the number of nearest neighbour and connectivity patterns on the classical random walk in the unbiased scenario. We find that the standard deviation of distance travelled by the walker is insensitive to the non-uniformity of the lattice profile leading to diffusive transport even in the finite size lattices. Our study indicates that the mass fractal dimension varies within a window $1.50\pm 0.03$ for all finite-size lattices. A weak ordering within the above window, correlated with the average coordination number, is observed, while Lieb and square lattices yielding the minimum and maximum values, respectively. However, confidence intervals reveal substantial statistical overlap for several lattice pairs even though the lattice profiles vary as far as the average number of connecting bonds and directionality of bonds are concerned. We also study the scaling complexity of the circumference of the closed curve traced by the walker while investigating the hull dimension. We find similar trend for hull fractal dimension as well and that was found to within the window $1.37\pm 0.03$ for finite-size lattices. Within the above window, the ordering remains qualitatively unaltered as compared to mass dimension while the confidence interval rectifies the order quantitatively. The square lattice clearly exhibits the upper bound for hull fractal dimension and the remaining lattices show extensive statistical overlap within the above window. We exhibit a tendency of the mass and hull fractal dimension to reach their thermodynamic values given by Brownian motion when we allow more number of steps within the finite size of the lattice, as confirmed by a data collapse analysis.
summary:
我们考虑各种二维格子，如方形、Kagome、Lieb、蜂窝、有限范围的骰子格子，以研究格子轮廓在无偏场景中最近邻数量和连通性模式对经典随机游走的影响。我们发现步行者行进距离的标准偏差对晶格轮廓的不均匀性不敏感，即使在有限尺寸的晶格中也会导致扩散传输。我们的研究表明，对于所有有限尺寸的晶格，质量分形维数在 $1.50\pm 0.03$ 的窗口内变化。观察到上述窗口内与平均配位数相关的弱排序，而 Lieb 和方晶格分别产生最小值和最大值。然而，置信区间揭示了几个晶格对的大量统计重叠，即使晶格轮廓在连接键的平均数量和键的方向性方面有所不同。我们还研究了步行者在研究船体尺寸时所追踪的闭合曲线周长的缩放复杂性。

我们也发现了船体分形维数的类似趋势，并且在有限尺寸晶格的窗口 $1.37\pm 0.03$ 内发现了这一趋势。在上述窗口内，与质量维度相比，排序在质量上保持不变，而置信区间则定量地调整顺序。方形晶格清楚地显示了船体分形维数的上限，其余晶格在上述窗口内显示出广泛的统计重叠。当我们在晶格的有限尺寸内允许更多的步数时，我们表现出质量和船体分形维数达到布朗运动给出的热力学值的趋势，正如数据崩溃分析所证实的那样。

title: Unveiling the Atomistic Mechanisms of Shear-Induced LDA$\leftrightarrow$HDA Transformations and Shear Banding in Amorphous Silicon under High Pressures
abstract: Large-scale molecular dynamics simulations of shear deformation under constant pressures of amorphous silicon, PT from low-density-amorphous (LDA) to high-density-amorphous (HDA) Si, and formation of shear bands (SBs) are performed using the state-of-the-art Gaussian Approximation Potential. The simulations reveal that LDA$\leftrightarrow$HDA shear-induced PTs occur simultaneously until reaching steady state. The developed mechanism-based analytical model well describes shear-strain-governed kinetics and steady states at all pressures, independent of shear stresses. Shear reduces the pressure for initiation and completion of LDA$\rightarrow$HDA PT by $4.36$ and $5.10$ GPa, respectively. Without PT at low pressure, shear-banding occurs, which is partially suppressed by PT at higher pressure with uniform deformation-PT at $9.8$ GPa. Despite the much larger shear and expected fraction of HDA, surprising sharp drop in the HDA atomic fraction within the SB was discovered. In bulk, Si deforms by atomic rearrangement in localized shear transformation zones with high nonaffine displacements, which trigger nucleation of HDA clusters within LDA and, concurrently, of LDA clusters within HDA, without growth and coalescence. In SB, a turbulent-like flow with swirls is revealed, which promotes reverse PT from HDA$\rightarrow$LDA more effectively. Transformation-induced plasticity in amorphous Si is revealed. The findings open up basic research into the mechanisms and kinetics of plastic strain-induced PTs in amorphous materials under high pressure, with numerous important applications.
summary:
使用最先进的高斯近似势对非晶硅恒压下的剪切变形、从低密度非晶 (LDA) 到高密度非晶 (HDA) 的 PT 以及剪切带 (SB) 的形成进行了大规模分子动力学模拟。模拟表明，LDA$\leftrightarrow$HDA 剪切引起的 PT 会同时发生，直到达到稳定状态。开发的基于机制的分析模型很好地描述了所有压力下的剪切应变控制动力学和稳态，与剪切应力无关。剪切力将 LDA$\rightarrow$HDA PT 的启动和完成压力分别降低了 $4.36$ 和 $5.10$ GPa。如果在低压下没有 PT，则会发生剪切带，而在较高压力下，均匀变形（9.8$ GPa 时的 PT）会部分抑制剪切带。尽管剪切力和 HDA 的预期分数要大得多，但发现 SB 内的 HDA 原子分数令人惊讶地急剧下降。

总体而言，Si 通过在具有高非仿射位移的局部剪切转变区中的原子重排而变形，这触发了 LDA 内的 HDA 簇的成核，同时触发了 HDA 内的 LDA 簇的成核，而没有生长和聚结。在SB中，揭示了带有漩涡的类湍流流，这更有效地促进了HDA$\rightarrow$LDA的反向PT。揭示了非晶硅中相变诱导的塑性。这些发现开启了高压非晶材料中塑性应变诱导 PT 的机理和动力学的基础研究，并具有许多重要的应用。

title: Melting upon cooling in a quantum magnet
abstract: Heating enhances thermal fluctuations and typically leads to melting of solids, but in exceptional cases, heating can also cause liquids to solidify. The paradigm of this counterintuitive phenomenon is solidification of liquid $^3$He upon increasing temperature, known as the Pomeranchuk effect. Here we show that such inverse melting also appears in quantum magnetism. We find that, on cooling, the Ising-like triangular-lattice antiferromagnet erbium heptatantalate first develops a three-sublattice long-range magnetic order -- analogous to a solid -- which then, unexpectedly, melts at even lower temperatures into a short-range correlated spin-stripe state -- analogous to a liquid. We propose that such an unprecedented ``spin Pomeranchuk effect" can generically arise from strong competition between spin-spin interactions in frustrated magnets, and provides a novel avenue to transformations between exotic magnetic phases.
summary: 加热会增强热波动，通常会导致固体熔化，但在特殊情况下，加热也会导致液体凝固。这种违反直觉的现象的范例是液体 $^3$He 在温度升高时凝固，称为波美兰丘克效应。在这里，我们表明这种逆熔化也出现在量子磁性中。我们发现，在冷却时，类伊辛三角晶格反铁磁体七钽酸铒首先形成三亚晶格的长程磁序（类似于固体），然后出人意料地在更低的温度下熔化成短程相关自旋条纹态（类似于液体）。我们提出，这种前所未有的“自旋波美兰丘克效应”通常可以由受挫磁体中自旋-自旋相互作用之间的强烈竞争产生，并为奇异磁相之间的转换提供了一种新的途径。

title: Effective long-range attraction of moiré excitons under the influence of atomic reconstructions and anisotropic screening
abstract: The moiré pattern, which emerges due to a relative rotation between two monolayers of transition metal dichalcogenides, features a long lattice period for small twist angles. The resulting band structure modulation acts as an effective potential for interlayer excitons (IXs), which can realize correlated many-body phenomena. Here, we aim for a material-realistic modelling of the exciton-exciton interaction, taking into account lattice reconstructions and an exciton-exciton potential that incorporates the highly anisotropic screening imposed by the two-dimensional bilayer and the dielectric background. We find strong modifications of the on-site interaction induced by the change of the moiré potential during lattice reconstructions, while for long-range interactions on the length scale of the moiré period, anisotropic dielectric screening leads to a crossover from a repulsive to an attractive interaction. The interaction potential and hopping amplitudes serve as parameters for a Bose-Hubbard model on the moiré lattice, which we use to explain correlated behavior of interlayer excitons.
summary: 莫尔图案是由于两个单层过渡金属二硫族化物之间的相对旋转而出现的，其特点是小扭转角具有长晶格周期。由此产生的能带结构调制充当层间激子（IX）的有效势，可以实现相关的多体现象。在这里，我们的目标是对激子-激子相互作用进行材料真实建模，考虑晶格重建和激子-激子势，其中结合了二维双层和介电背景所施加的高度各向异性屏蔽。我们发现在晶格重建过程中莫尔势的变化引起了现场相互作用的强烈修改，而对于莫尔周期长度尺度上的长程相互作用，各向异性介电屏蔽导致从排斥相互作用到吸引相互作用的交叉。相互作用势和跳跃幅度作为莫尔晶格上 Bose-Hubbard 模型的参数，我们用它来解释层间激子的相关行为。

title: Plastic deformation of B19' martensite where -- where it matters in NiTi technology
abstract: Nitinol technology, besides utilizing the functional thermomechanical properties derived from the B2 cubic to B19' monoclinic martensitic transformation, also exploits the excellent plastic deformability of NiTi in the martensite state. It originates from the unique mechanism of plastic deformation of the B19' martensite by kwinking involving dislocation slip based kinking assisted by deformation twinning. Although the mechanism of plastic deformation of martensite by kwinking was revealed only very recently, various unusual phenomena that can only be rationalized by kwinking, have been reported in literature in the last 50 years. These phenomena include: 1) cold working with a high degree of reduction without introducing cracks, 2) excellent plastic deformability in the martensite state (plastic deformation up to~80% strain at stresses >1GPa), 3) refinement of austenitic microstructure to a quasi-amorphous state by tensile deformation, 4) observation of high density of {114} deformation bands in austenitic microstructures, 5) systematic ruptures of strengthened NiTi wires in tensile tests via necking at the onset of plastic yielding, 6) localized plastic deformation in tensile tests via propagation of Lüders band fronts with very large localized strain (~40%), 7) unusually long upper stress plateaus in superelastic tensile tests (>8% strain), 8) large plastic strains (> 20 %) generated in a single closed-loop cooling/heating cycle under constant stress, 9) shape setting of already annealed NiTi by heating under external constraint. Finally, we discuss how kwinking deformation was considered in constitutive modelling of thermomechanical behaviors of NiTi and, particularly, what is the role of the kwinking deformation in NiTi technology.
summary:
镍钛诺技术除了利用B2立方到B19'单斜马氏体转变所带来的功能性热机械性能外，还利用了NiTi在马氏体状态下优异的塑性变形能力。它源自 B19' 马氏体通过扭折产生塑性变形的独特机制，涉及基于位错滑移的扭折，并辅以变形孪生。尽管马氏体通过扭动产生塑性变形的机制直到最近才被揭示，但在过去 50 年的文献中已经报道了只能通过扭动来合理化的各种不寻常现象。

这些现象包括：1）高压缩率冷加工而不引入裂纹，2）马氏体状态下优异的塑性变形能力（在应力>1GPa时塑性变形高达〜80％应变），3）通过拉伸变形将奥氏体微观结构细化至准非晶态，4）在奥氏体微观结构中观察到高密度的{114}变形带，5）在拉伸试验中强化NiTi丝的系统断裂通过塑性屈服开始时的颈缩，6) 拉伸试验中的局部塑性变形，通过具有非常大的局部应变 (~40%) 的吕德斯带前沿的传播，7) 超弹性拉伸试验中异常长的上应力平台（>8% 应变），8) 在恒定应力下的单个闭环冷却/加热循环中产生大塑性应变 (>20%)，9) 通过在外部加热下对已退火的 NiTi 进行形状设定约束。最后，我们讨论了在 NiTi 热机械行为的本构建模中如何考虑扭动变形，特别是扭动变形在 NiTi 技术中的作用。

title: Dynamical pseudopotentials
abstract: Pseudopotential theory has greatly driven first-principles calculations in materials, replacing the explicit treatment of the chemically inert core electrons with an effective potential acting only on the valence states. This is inherently an embedding problem, where tracing out the core electrons can be formulated in terms of a dynamical embedding potential. Motivated by this perspective, we first introduce a framework for dynamical (i.e., energy-dependent) pseudopotentials, showing how this leads to generalized norm-conservation conditions. Then, adopting a sum-over-poles representation, we disentangle the number of reference energies from the number of projectors; this allows to reproduce all-electron scattering at many reference energies with great accuracy and over very extended energy ranges. We further show that these pseudopotentials enter naturally into many-body total energy functionals, leading for the first time to a consistent and unified treatment of the all-electron atom, the pseudo-atom, and the solid within the same electronic-structure theory.
summary: 赝势理论极大地推动了材料中的第一原理计算，用仅作用于价态的有效势取代了对化学惰性核心电子的显式处理。这本质上是一个嵌入问题，其中可以根据动态嵌入势来制定核心电子的追踪。受这个观点的启发，我们首先引入动态（即能量相关）赝势的框架，展示这如何导致广义范数守恒条件。然后，采用极点和表示，我们将参考能量的数量与投影仪的数量分开；这使得能够在许多参考能量下以高精度和非常扩展的能量范围再现全电子散射。我们进一步表明，这些赝势自然地进入多体总能量泛函中，从而首次在同一电子结构理论中对全电子原子、赝原子和固体进行一致和统一的处理。

title: Nonlocal transport phenomena in coupled quasiperiodic Kitaev chains
abstract: We investigate the topological phases in a coupled one-dimensional p-wave superconducting Fibonacci quasicrystal modeled by the quasiperiodic Kitaev chain. Recent studies have shown that the coupled system can host topological edge modes with Majorana fermions and enhance their topological protection, depending on the pattern of quasiperiodicity. In this work, we elucidate the topological phases of the coupled system and demonstrate the dependence of differential conductance on the lead connecting pattern employing the Keldysh formalism and the recursive Green's function method. Our findings reveal the emergence of topological phases in the coupled system, which are characterized by the presence of Majorana edge modes and the seepage of the Majorana wave function. Furthermore, we identify a new topological phase transition induced by quasiperiodicity in the coupled system.
summary: 我们研究了由准周期基塔耶夫链建模的耦合一维 p 波超导斐波那契准晶体中的拓扑相。最近的研究表明，耦合系统可以容纳马约拉纳费米子的拓扑边缘模式，并根据准周期性模式增强其拓扑保护。在这项工作中，我们阐明了耦合系统的拓扑相，并采用凯尔迪什形式主义和递归格林函数方法证明了微分电导对引线连接模式的依赖性。我们的研究结果揭示了耦合系统中拓扑相的出现，其特征是马约拉纳边缘模式的存在和马约拉纳波函数的渗透。此外，我们还发现了耦合系统中由准周期性引起的新拓扑相变。

title: Role of mass fluctuations in the diffusion of clusters of Brownian particles with activity
abstract: Motivated by the anomalous diffusion observed in clusters of active Brownian particles (ABPs), where the center-of-mass diffusion coefficient scales as $D\sim N^{-1/2}$ with respect to the number $N$ of particles in the cluster, we derive a minimal theoretical framework starting from the single-particle Langevin equations. The model consists of two coupled stochastic equations: one for the cluster center-of-mass trajectory and one for the mass evolution $N(t)$, explicitly accounting for stochastic displacements induced by particle attachment and detachment. We specialize and validate the framework against ABP simulations of isolated clusters in stationary conditions, where $N(t)$ follows a Gaussian process with mean $N_0$, variance $\propto N_0^\beta$, and persistence time $\propto N_0^\kappa$. Analytical solution of the coupled equations yields the long-time diffusion coefficient as the sum of two contributions: a conventional term $\propto N_0^{-1}$) due to thermal noise plus summation of active forces, and a fluctuation-driven term $\propto N_0^{-\delta}$ with $\delta=2-2/d-\beta+\kappa$, where $d$ is the spatial dimension. We demonstrate that anomalous scaling emerges whenever the second term becomes dominant. The model predicts $D\sim N^{-\alpha}$ with $\alpha=0.63\pm0.06$, in good quantitative agreement with large-scale ABP simulations.
summary:
受活跃布朗粒子 (ABP) 簇中观察到的反常扩散的启发，其中质心扩散系数相对于簇中粒子数量 $N$ 的比例为 $D\sim N^{-1/2}$，我们从单粒子朗之万方程出发推导出一个最小的理论框架。该模型由两个耦合的随机方程组成：一个用于簇质心轨迹，另一个用于质量演化$N(t)$，明确地考虑了粒子附着和分离引起的随机位移。我们针对静止条件下孤立簇的 ABP 模拟专门化并验证了该框架，其中 $N(t)$ 遵循均值 $N_0$、方差 $\propto N_0^\beta$ 和持续时间 $\propto N_0^\kappa$ 的高斯过程。耦合方程的解析解产生长时扩散系数作为两个贡献的总和：由于热噪声加上主动力总和而产生的常规项 $\propto N_0^{-1}$)，以及波动驱动项 $\propto N_0^{-\delta}$，其中 $\delta=2-2/d-\beta+\kappa$，其中 $d$ 是空间维度。

我们证明，每当第二项占主导地位时，就会出现异常缩放。该模型预测 $D\sim N^{-\alpha}$ ，其中 $\alpha=0.63\pm0.06$，与大规模 ABP 模拟在定量上具有良好的一致性。

title: Understanding the Dynamics of Evaporation-Driven Colloidal Self-Assembly
abstract: Complex colloidal cluster morphologies are desirable for the fabrication of advanced materials, such as photonic crystals and meta-materials, and can be formed through evaporation-driven packing. By coupling lattice Boltzmann and discrete element methods, here we elucidate the rich interplay between fluid and particle dynamics during evaporation-driven self-assembly of spherical colloidal particles. We construct a regime diagram for a wide range of evaporation rates, interparticle friction coefficients, and particle numbers, identifying parameter regimes for open, closed, and minimal moment of inertia cluster configurations. Analyzing the competition between capillary, hydrodynamic, normal, and friction forces, we show that interparticle friction can exert a disproportionately strong influence on the final packing outcome despite being considerably smaller in magnitude than other forces at play. Our simulation results further highlight the potential for tuning colloidal cluster configurations via their dynamic trajectories.
summary: 复杂的胶体簇形态对于制造先进材料（例如光子晶体和超材料）是理想的，并且可以通过蒸发驱动的堆积形成。通过耦合格子玻尔兹曼和离散元方法，我们阐明了在蒸发驱动的球形胶体颗粒自组装过程中流体和颗粒动力学之间丰富的相互作用。我们构建了各种蒸发速率、颗粒间摩擦系数和颗粒数量的状态图，确定了开放、封闭和最小惯性矩簇配置的参数状态。通过分析毛细管力、流体动力力、法向力和摩擦力之间的竞争，我们发现颗粒间摩擦力可以对最终的堆积结果产生不成比例的强烈影响，尽管其大小比其他作用力要小得多。我们的模拟结果进一步凸显了通过动态轨迹调整胶体簇结构的潜力。

title: Guidelines for band gap opening in graphene superlattices with periodic π-vacancy distribution
abstract: Periodic $\pi$-vacancies in graphene superlattices (GSLs) provide a symmetry-based route to band-gap opening in graphene by modifying the $\pi$-band dispersion. However, the symmetry conditions that determine whether a vacancy motif can open a band gap remain unclear. Here, we investigate periodic $\pi$-vacancy GSLs using a nearest-neighbor tight-binding model with one $p_z$ orbital per carbon site to identify the symmetry requirements for gap opening. $\pi$-vacancies, representing functionalized, substituted, or missing carbon sites, are modeled as site deletions in the $\pi$ basis, with all hopping matrix elements to and from the deleted sites set to zero. We focus on $\pi$-vacancy motifs with $C_2$ and $C_3$ point-group symmetry. A $3n \times 3n$ GSL, where $n=1,2,3,\ldots$ is the integer scaling factor multiplying the honeycomb primitive-cell vectors, folds $K$ and $K'$ to $\Gamma$ and can therefore open a band gap. For $C_3$-type vacancies, the Dirac cones remain pinned at high-symmetry points and thus stay at $\Gamma$ in folded $3n$ GSLs. In contrast, $C_2$-type vacancies that reduce the global point group of the GSL to $D_{2h}$ by preserving a pair of perpendicular mirror symmetries, $\sigma_v \perp \sigma_d$, can also constrain the Dirac cones to $\Gamma$. When the $\sigma_v$ and $\sigma_d$ mirror planes are absent, the cones are allowed to shift away from $\Gamma$ to $(\pm \Delta q,\pm \Delta q)$ in the $3n$ superlattice.
summary:
石墨烯超晶格（GSL）中的周期性$\pi$-空位通过修改$\pi$-带色散提供了基于对称性的石墨烯带隙打开途径。然而，决定空位基序是否可以打开带隙的对称条件仍不清楚。在这里，我们使用最近邻紧束缚模型研究周期性 $\pi$-空位 GSL，每个碳位点有一个 $p_z$ 轨道，以确定间隙打开的对称性要求。 $\pi$-空位，代表功能化、取代或缺失的碳位点，被建模为$\pi$基础上的位点删除，所有进出删除位点的跳跃矩阵元素设置为零。我们关注具有 $C_2$ 和 $C_3$ 点群对称性的 $\pi$-空位图案。 $3n \times 3n$ GSL，其中 $n=1,2,3,\ldots$ 是与蜂窝原始单元向量相乘的整数缩放因子，将 $K$ 和 $K'$ 折叠为 $\Gamma$，因此可以打开带隙。对于 $C_3$ 型空位，狄拉克锥体保持固定在高对称点，因此在折叠的 $3n$ GSL 中保持在 $\Gamma$ 处。

相比之下，通过保留一对垂直镜像对称性 $\sigma_v \perp \sigma_d$ 将 GSL 的全局点群减少到 $D_{2h}$ 的 $C_2$ 型空位也可以将狄拉克锥限制为 $\Gamma$。当 $\sigma_v$ 和 $\sigma_d$ 镜面不存在时，允许锥体从 $\Gamma$ 移动到 $3n$ 超晶格中的 $(\pm \Delta q,\pm \Delta q)$。

title: Efficient Quasi-Resonant, Polarization-Selective Excitation of GaN Quantum Emitters
abstract: Defect centers in GaN emerge as bright sources of single-photons which recently have been demonstrated to optically interface a localized spin. However, the structure and composition of these defects as well as their efficient excitation techniques were not a subject of thorough studies. This work presents evidence that by tuning the excitation laser energy to specific resonance values the excitation efficiency can be enhanced, resulting in relative increase of photoluminescence intensity by up to an order of magnitude. The resonances can be selectively addressed with linearly polarized light, while the emission dipole remains unchanged, enabling polarization-controlled enhancement. These results establish an efficient way of excitation for GaN-based emitters, thereby increasing the generation rate of photons. The data is consistent with excitation via localized vibrational modes associated with point-defect complexes, establishing a practical quasi-resonant route to brighter, polarization-addressable operation of GaN defect emitters and clarifying their energy-level structure.
summary: GaN 中的缺陷中心作为单光子的明亮源出现，最近已被证明可以光学连接局部自旋。然而，这些缺陷的结构和组成以及它们的有效激发技术尚未得到深入研究。这项工作提供的证据表明，通过将激发激光能量调整到特定的共振值，可以提高激发效率，从而使光致发光强度相对增加一个数量级。可以用线偏振光选择性地解决共振问题，同时发射偶极子保持不变，从而实现偏振控制增强。这些结果为 GaN 基发射器建立了一种有效的激发方式，从而提高了光子的产生率。这些数据与通过与点缺陷复合物相关的局域振动模式激发一致，建立了一条实用的准谐振路线，使 GaN 缺陷发射体实现更亮、偏振可寻址的操作，并阐明了它们的能级结构。

title: Temperature dependence of the Gibbs energies of formation of point defects in B2 MoTa from ab initio calculations
abstract: Using B2 MoTa, the strongest B2 former among group V/VI refractory binaries, as a model system, we compute temperature-dependent Gibbs energies of formation of vacancies and antisites from ab initio calculations up to 3000 K at the stoichiometric composition. We explicitly account for thermal electronic excitations, vibrational anharmonicity, and electron-vibration coupling. The key finding is that the temperature dependence of the Gibbs energies of vacancy formation exhibits a pronounced sublattice asymmetry. Specifically, the Gibbs energy of formation of a Mo-site vacancy decreases by 1.1 eV from 0 to 3000 K, whereas the decrease for a Ta-site vacancy amounts to 2.1 eV, almost a factor of two larger. Two contributions of distinct origin govern the temperature dependence of this asymmetry: a quasiharmonic contribution associated with the chemical-potential imbalance set by the two antisite structures and an anharmonic contribution associated with the local vibrational response of the vacancy structures. The asymmetry in anharmonic vibrations is traced back to an enlarged local vibrational distribution of the first-nearest neighbors around the Ta-site vacancy. In contrast to the vacancies, the Gibbs energies of antisite formation vary only weakly with temperature.
summary: 中文摘要自动翻译失败，请展开查看英文原文。

title: Symmetric estimator for discrete self-energy of discrete many-body systems
abstract: We derive a discrete spectral representation of the single-particle self-energy using a discrete evaluation of Kugler's symmetric improved estimator. Our construction can be used on both the real and the complex (Matsubara) frequency axis. It is guaranteed to remain causal at the numerical level, in contrast to standard approaches that may generate unphysical negative spectral weight or require additional broadening. Our representation can be used for any Hamiltonian; here we apply it to quantum impurity models and in dynamical mean-field theory. The latter is formulated with a discrete hybridization function throughout its self-consistency loop. In both cases and across various numerical methods, we obtain significantly improved accuracy for a range of impurity properties.
summary: 我们使用库格勒对称改进估计器的离散评估得出单粒子自能的离散谱表示。我们的结构可用于实数和复数（松原）频率轴。与可能产生非物理负谱权重或需要额外拓宽的标准方法相比，它保证在数值水平上保持因果关系。我们的表示可用于任何哈密顿量；在这里，我们将其应用于量子杂质模型和动态平均场理论。后者是在其自洽循环中用离散杂交函数来制定的。在这两种情况下以及通过各种数值方法，我们获得了一系列杂质特性的显着提高的精度。

title: Nonlinear phonon dispersion in disordered solids and non-Debye vibrational spectra
abstract: All solids, whether crystalline or disordered, support elastic wave propagation with a linear dispersion relation in the long-wavelength limit. These waves, corresponding to low-frequency phonons, feature a vibrational density of states that follows Debye's classical model. Deviations from Debye's predictions with increasing frequency can emerge from phonon dispersion nonlinearity and from non-phononic vibrational modes, which exist in non-crystalline solids due to structural disorder. Both nonlinear phonon dispersion in disordered solids and its relative contribution to non-Debye anomalies, most notably manifested by the controversial boson peak, remain poorly understood. Here we show that nonlinear phonon dispersion in a broad range of disordered solids, including elastic networks and various glasses, emerge from a mesoscopic, disorder-induced lengthscale, which also controls wave attenuation. We subsequently use analysis and large-scale computer simulations to quantitatively determine the relative contributions of nonlinear phonon softening and non-phononic vibrations to the onset of non-Debye anomalies and to the boson peak. We show that the relative magnitude of the two contributions strongly depends on the strength of disorder of the solid, e.g., controlled by the thermal history upon glass formation, and that for realistic laboratory glasses both pieces of physics significantly contribute to the boson peak. These findings constitute basic progress in understanding disordered solids.
summary:
所有固体，无论是结晶的还是无序的，都支持弹性波在长波长极限内具有线性色散关系的传播。这些波对应于低频声子，具有遵循德拜经典模型的振动态密度。随着频率的增加，声子色散非线性和非声子振动模式会出现与德拜预测的偏差，这些振动模式由于结构无序而存在于非晶固体中。无序固体中的非线性声子色散及其对非德拜异常的相对贡献（最显着的是有争议的玻色子峰）仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们展示了广泛的无序固体（包括弹性网络和各种玻璃）中的非线性声子色散是从介观的、无序引起的长度尺度中出现的，它也控制着波的衰减。随后，我们使用分析和大规模计算机模拟来定量确定非线性声子软化和非声子振动对非德拜异常的出现和玻色子峰值的相对贡献。

我们表明，这两种贡献的相对大小在很大程度上取决于固体无序的强度，例如，由玻璃形成时的热历史控制，并且对于现实的实验室玻璃，这两种物理学对玻色子峰都有显着贡献。这些发现构成了理解无序固体方面的基本进展。

title: Nonequilibrium Fluctuation-Response Theory in the Frequency Domain
abstract: We develop a unified fluctuation-response theory in the frequency domain for nonequilibrium steady states governed by overdamped Langevin dynamics and Markov jump processes. The relation expresses the power spectrum of general observables exactly as a quadratic form of local responses measured at the same frequency, thereby extending static nonequilibrium fluctuation-response relations to finite frequencies. The decomposition is spatial for Langevin systems and edge-resolved for Markov jump processes, and applies uniformly to state-dependent observables, current-like observables, and their combinations. As consequences of the same identity, we derive frequency-domain response uncertainty relations, kinetic and thermodynamic uncertainty relations, the equilibrium fluctuation-dissipation theorem, and Harada-Sasa-type relations. Applications to stochastic networks and driven diffusive systems illustrate how the theory resolves fluctuation spectra into edge-wise contributions and reveals frequency-dependent tradeoffs between fluctuations, response, and dissipation.
summary: 我们在频域中针对由过阻尼朗之万动力学和马尔可夫跳跃过程控制的非平衡稳态开发了统一的涨落响应理论。该关系将一般可观测量的功率谱精确地表达为在相同频率下测量的局部响应的二次形式，从而将静态非平衡波动响应关系扩展到有限频率。对于朗之万系统，分解是空间的；对于马尔可夫跳跃过程，分解是边缘解析的，并且统一适用于状态相关的可观测量、类电流可观测量及其组合。作为相同恒等式的结果，我们推导出频域响应不确定性关系、动力学和热力学不确定性关系、平衡涨落耗散定理和 Harada-Sasa 型关系。在随机网络和驱动扩散系统中的应用说明了该理论如何将涨落谱解析为边缘贡献，并揭示了涨落、响应和耗散之间依赖于频率的权衡。

title: Interaction-controlled localization in one-dimensional chain: From edges to domain walls
abstract: Using Hartree-Fock mean-field approach, we study the role of on-site ($U$) and extended ($V$) Hubbard interactions on the existence and evolution of edge modes in a half-filled Su-Schrieffer-Heeger (SSH) chain. We analyze the energy spectrum, local probability amplitudes, and site-resolved charge and spin density profiles across topological, critical, and trivial hopping regimes. We find that the localization of bound states is controlled by the ratio $2V/U$, with edge spin-density-wave modes for $U>2V$ and mid-chain charge-density-wave domain walls for $U<2V$, independent of band topology. These results establish the correlation-driven origin of localized states in finite one-dimensional chains.
summary: 使用 Hartree-Fock 平均场方法，我们研究了半填充 Su-Schrieffer-Heeger (SSH) 链中现场 ($U$) 和扩展 ($V$) 哈伯德相互作用对边缘模式的存在和演化的作用。我们分析了拓扑、临界和平凡跳跃机制的能谱、局部概率幅度以及位点分辨电荷和自旋密度分布。我们发现束缚态的局域化由$2V/U$之比控制，边缘自旋密度波模式为$U>2V$，中链电荷密度波畴壁为$U<2V$，与能带拓扑无关。这些结果建立了有限一维链中局域态的相关驱动起源。

title: Microscopic evidence for imaginary charge density wave in a kagome metal
abstract: Dissipationless charge transport without any energy loss is one of the most fascinating phenomena in condensed matter physics. This extraordinary state manifests in two well-established systems: superconductors and quantum Hall systems. A proposed third category is associated with chiral loop current order, characterized by the spontaneous formation of microscopic electric current loops. The microscopic origin of these currents stems from imaginary hopping terms, conceptualized as an imaginary charge density wave (iCDW). Despite extensive investigations, its existence remains highly controversial. Here we report site-selective spectroscopic evidence for a pure iCDW in the kagome nonmagnetic metal CsV$_3$Sb$_5$. Nuclear quadrupole resonance spectra at out-of-plane $^{121}$Sb site sensitive to in-plane currents reveal anomalous broadening below $T^*\approx$120 K, coinciding with the nematic transition well above the real charge density wave (CDW). Under magnetic fields, the spectra exhibit asymmetric lineshapes, demonstrating that this broadening purely originates from magnetic effects rather than from electric quadrupolar effects associated with CDW fluctuations. The observed lineshapes are quantitatively consistent with ~1 mT local fields induced by chiral loop currents, indicating spontaneous time-reversal symmetry breaking. This microscopic identification of the long-sought pure iCDW establishes a novel form of quantum order, potentially revolutionizing our understanding of exotic electronic states in quantum materials.
summary:
没有任何能量损失的无耗散电荷传输是凝聚态物理中最迷人的现象之一。这种非凡的状态体现在两个成熟的系统中：超导体和量子霍尔系统。提出的第三类与手性环电流级相关，其特征在于微观电流环的自发形成。这些电流的微观起源源于假想的跳跃项，概念化为假想的电荷密度波（iCDW）。尽管进行了广泛的调查，但它的存在仍然存在很大争议。在这里，我们报告了 kagome 非磁性金属 CsV$_3$Sb$_5$ 中纯 iCDW 的位点选择性光谱证据。对面内电流敏感的面外 $^{121}$Sb 位点的核四极共振谱揭示了低于 $T^*\approx$120 K 的异常展宽，与远高于实际电荷密度波 (CDW) 的向列相转变一致。在磁场下，光谱呈现出不对称的线形，表明这种展宽纯粹源于磁效应，而不是与 CDW 波动相关的电四极效应。

观察到的线形在数量上与手性环路电流感应的约 1 mT 局部场一致，表明自发的时间反转对称性破缺。这种对长期寻求的纯 iCDW 的微观识别建立了一种新颖的量子秩序形式，有可能彻底改变我们对量子材料中奇异电子态的理解。

title: Kink-kink correlations in nonlinear quenches across a quantum critical point
abstract: When a quantum system exhibiting a second order phase transition is quenched across the critical point in large but finite time, the dynamics are not adiabatic in the critical region and the Kibble-Zurek (KZ) mechanism provides a framework to determine local observables such as the mean defect density. However, to find higher-point functions, one has to go beyond the KZ paradigm asshown in recent works on one-dimensional transverse field Ising model (TFIM) following a linear quench. It has been found that (i) besides the KZ scale, the quench dynamics depend on another length scale that arises due to the finite phase difference between the low energy modes, and (ii) contrary to the expectations based on the KZ mechanism, in general, the correlation functions do not decay exponentially with distance. Motivated by these results for the linear quench, we are interested in understanding if these properties are universal, and consider the 1D TFIM when the transverse field varies algebraically in the vicinity of the critical field. We focus on the equal-time,longitudinal kink-kink correlation function at the end of the quench from the paramagnetic to the ferromagnetic phase, and find that (i) the correlator depends only on the KZ length for superlinear quenches, otherwise an additional dephasing length is required to describe it, and (ii) the dephased correlator decays as a compressed exponential with an exponent that changes continuously with the quench exponent. Our results are obtained using an adiabatic perturbation theory, analytical arguments and exact numerical integration of the relevant equations.
summary:
当表现出二阶相变的量子系统在较长但有限的时间内跨越临界点时，动力学在临界区域不是绝热的，Kibble-Zurek (KZ) 机制提供了一个框架来确定局部可观测量，例如平均缺陷密度。然而，为了找到更高点的函数，我们必须超越 KZ 范式，如最近关于线性淬火后的一维横向场伊辛模型 (TFIM) 的工作所示。研究发现（i）除了 KZ 尺度之外，失超动力学还取决于由于低能模式之间的有限相位差而产生的另一个长度尺度，以及（ii）与基于 KZ 机制的预期相反，一般来说，相关函数不会随距离呈指数衰减。受线性失超这些结果的启发，我们有兴趣了解这些属性是否具有普遍性，并考虑当横向场在临界场附近以代数方式变化时的一维 TFIM。

我们关注从顺磁相到铁磁相失超结束时的等时纵向扭结-扭结相关函数，发现（i）相关器仅依赖于超线性失超的 KZ 长度，否则需要额外的移相长度来描述它，（ii）失相相关器以压缩指数形式衰减，其指数随失超指数连续变化。我们的结果是使用绝热微扰理论、解析论证和相关方程的精确数值积分获得的。

title: Dynamical correlations in a dissipative XXZ spin chain
abstract: We study dynamical spin correlations in a dissipative XXZ spin chain subject to uniform local spin-loss and pumping. Starting from a mixed steady state that is featureless albeit possessing finite magnetization, rich dynamics emerges in time-dependent two-point correlators evaluated on top of it. For unitary evolution in which the reservoir is absent, the longitudinal correlators reproduce the established hierarchy of spin-transport universality classes - ballistic, Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ) superdiffusive, and diffusive - across the phase diagram. However, for finite magnetization, additional ballistic light cone propagation gets superimposed on the previous universality classes, arising from magnon this http URL transverse correlator displays very fast, exponential decay of correlations without wavefront propagation in the easy-plane case. At the isotropic point, it follows KPZ scaling due to $SU(2)$ symmetry, while in the easy-axis regime, it is characterized by ballistic spreading of correlations. Under full Lindbladian dynamics, the universality classes are preserved at early times, while the correlations acquire an overall exponential damping in the long-time limit. In terms of methods, we have used vectorized TEBD for numerical simulations and exact analytical results obtained via a Pfaffian representation and the third-quantization framework for the noninteracting XX case.
summary:
我们研究了受均匀局部自旋损失和泵浦影响的耗散 XXZ 自旋链中的动态自旋相关性。从尽管具有有限磁化强度但没有特征的混合稳态开始，在其之上评估的时间依赖性两点相关器中出现了丰富的动态。对于不存在储层的酉演化，纵向相关器在相图中再现了已建立的自旋输运普遍性类别的层次结构 - 弹道、Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ) 超扩散和扩散。然而，对于有限磁化，额外的弹道光锥传播会叠加在先前的普遍性类别上，这是由磁振子引起的，该 http URL 横向相关器在易平面情况下显示非常快的指数衰减相关性，而无需波前传播​​。在各向同性点，由于 $SU(2)$ 对称性，它遵循 KPZ 缩放，而在易轴状态下，它的特征是相关性的弹道扩展。在完整的 Lindbladian 动力学下，普遍性类别在早期被保留，而相关性在长期限制内获得整体指数阻尼。

在方法方面，我们使用矢量化 TEBD 进行数值模拟，并通过 Pfaffian 表示和非交互 XX 情况的第三量化框架获得精确的分析结果。

title: Singular Behavior of Observables at Hopf Bifurcations
abstract: Hopf bifurcations are a universal route to self-sustained oscillations in driven systems. Despite the absence of any singular stationary state, we show that time-averaged observables generically exhibit singularities at the onset of oscillations. The origin of this behavior is geometric: phase averaging over the emergent periodic attractor eliminates odd powers of the oscillation amplitude, while the squared amplitude varies smoothly with the distance from the bifurcation. Consequently, the excess of any smooth time-averaged observable admits an integer-power expansion; observables remain finite but display discontinuities in finite-order derivatives. This yields an Ehrenfest-like hierarchy of Hopf singularities, in which the first nonanalytic derivative is determined by the lowest-order coupling between the observable and the limit-cycle waveform that survives phase averaging. Generic observables therefore exhibit kink singularities, while symmetry or geometric cancellations can suppress lower-order couplings and shift nonanalyticity to higher derivatives. We demonstrate this mechanism in chemical, electronic, and climate oscillators. Our results identify supercritical Hopf bifurcations as a universal mechanism for nonanalytic observable behavior, where singular features arise without any underlying singular stationary state. They thus provide a generic setting for singular behavior without divergence.
summary:
Hopf 分岔是驱动系统中自持振荡的通用途径。尽管不存在任何奇异的稳态，我们表明时间平均可观测量通常在振荡开始时表现出奇点。这种行为的起源是几何的：对出现的周期性吸引子进行相位平均消除了振荡幅度的奇次幂，而平方幅度随着距分叉的距离平滑变化。因此，任何平滑时间平均可观测量的过剩都允许整数幂展开；可观测量仍然是有限的，但在有限阶导数中显示出不连续性。这产生了霍普夫奇点的类似埃伦菲斯特的层次结构，其中第一个非解析导数由可观测波形和经过相位平均的极限环波形之间的最低阶耦合确定。因此，一般可观测量表现出扭结奇点，而对称性或几何抵消可以抑制低阶耦合并将非解析性转移到更高的导数。我们在化学、电子和气候振荡器中证明了这种机制。

我们的结果将超临界 Hopf 分岔确定为非分析可观察行为的通用机制，其中奇异特征的出现没有任何潜在的奇异静止状态。因此，它们为没有分歧的单一行为提供了通用设置。

title: Mixed-Parity Altermagnetism in Collinear Spin-Orbital Magnets
abstract: Altermagnetism has so far mainly been understood in its even- and odd-parity forms. We show that collinear antiferromagnets with zero net magnetization can also host mixed-parity spin splitting, namely neither purely even nor purely odd in momentum. We identify the symmetry conditions for such mixed-parity altermagnetism and show that, in two dimensions, it can arise in spin-orbital magnets when the two antiparallel spin sectors are related by a single mirror symmetry. Using a two-sublattice two-orbital model, we demonstrate that circularly polarized light induces mixed-parity altermagnetism at finite staggered potential and odd-parity spin-orbital altermagnetism at zero staggered potential. Mixed-parity altermagnetism thereby emerges as the intermediate spin-split regime between even- and odd-parity altermagnetism when spin splitting and zero net magnetization are maintained. Spin-resolved orbital Edelstein effects provide a complementary electrical probe of the underlying spin-orbital order.
summary: 迄今为止，交变磁力主要以偶宇称和奇宇称形式来理解。我们证明，具有零净磁化强度的共线反铁磁体也可以进行混合宇称自旋分裂，即动量既不是纯偶数也不是纯奇数。我们确定了这种混合宇称交变磁性的对称条件，并表明，在二维中，当两个反平行自旋扇区通过单个镜像对称性相关时，它可以在自旋轨道磁体中出现。使用两个子晶格双轨道模型，我们证明了圆偏振光在有限交错电势下诱导混合宇称交错磁力，在零交错电势下诱导奇宇称自旋轨道交变磁力。因此，当自旋分裂和零净磁化保持时，混合宇称交变磁性作为偶宇称和奇宇称交变磁性之间的中间自旋分裂状态出现。自旋分辨轨道埃德尔斯坦效应提供了潜在自旋轨道顺序的互补电探针。

title: Spindle solutions with hyperscalars in $D=4$ gauged supergravity
abstract: We construct new classes of supersymmetric $AdS_2\times \Sigma$ solutions, where $\Sigma=\Sigma(n_N,n_S)$ is a spindle. Such solutions can arise as the near horizon limit of supersymmetric, accelerating black holes. The solutions are constructed using $D=4$ STU $U(1)^4$ gauged supergravity theory coupled to a charged hyperscalar, and can be uplifted to obtain smooth, supersymmetric $AdS_2\times Y_9$ solutions of $D=11$ supergravity. We allow $(n_N,n_S)$ to be non-coprime integers, including orbifolds of the round $S^2$. We also allow the hyperscalar to vanish at the poles. The $AdS_2$ solutions with non-vanishing hyperscalar can naturally arise as the endpoint of holographic RG flows, triggered by relevant hyperscalar deformations of the $AdS_2$ solutions of the STU model.
summary: 我们构造新类的超对称 $AdS_2\times \Sigma$ 解，其中 $\Sigma=\Sigma(n_N,n_S)$ 是主轴。这样的解决方案可以作为超对称加速黑洞的近地平线极限而出现。这些解是使用 $D=4$ STU $U(1)^4$ 计量超重力理论与带电超标量耦合构建的，并且可以提升以获得 $D=11$ 超重力的平滑、超对称 $AdS_2\times Y_9$ 解。我们允许 $(n_N,n_S)$ 为非互质整数，包括圆 $S^2$ 的轨道。我们还允许超标量在两极消失。具有非消失超标量的 $AdS_2$ 解可以自然地作为全息 RG 流的端点出现，由 STU 模型的 $AdS_2$ 解的相关超标量变形触发。

title: Heterotic String Theory Suggests a QCD Axion Near 0.5 neV
abstract: We show that in heterotic string theory -- and dual corners of the landscape including Type I string theory -- the QCD axion mass is bounded from below by $m_a \gtrsim 0.5$ neV, a direct consequence of the model-independent axion whose decay constant is fixed by the grand unified theory (GUT) gauge coupling. We explicitly compute the mass of the QCD axion in an ensemble of heterotic compactifications on Calabi-Yau hypersurfaces of toric varieties sampled from the Kreuzer-Skarke (KS) ensemble, as well as on complete intersection Calabi-Yau manifolds. We then perform an extensive search over the Kähler moduli space of KS compactifications with up to $11$ axions -- the maximum we identify as consistent with unification in our sample. We establish that for all but a handful of manifolds the QCD axion mass is precisely the model-independent value, lying in $[0.5, 0.8]$ neV, depending on the GUT gauge coupling. This window should be a high-priority target for future lumped-element detectors such as DMRadio-GUT. We show that the heavy axion population in our heterotic ensemble generically decays before big bang nucleosynthesis and can naturally accommodate leptogenesis, unlike in Type IIB axiverse constructions.
summary:
我们证明，在异质弦理论以及包括 I 型弦理论在内的景观的双角中，QCD 轴子质量从下方以 $m_a \gtrsim 0.5$ neV 为界，这是与模型无关的轴子的直接结果，其衰减常数由大统一理论 (GUT) 规范耦合固定。我们明确计算了从 Kreuzer-Skarke (KS) 系综中采样的环面变体 Calabi-Yau 超曲面上的异质紧化系综中以及完全相交 Calabi-Yau 流形上 QCD 轴子的质量。然后，我们对 KS 紧化的 Kähler 模空间进行了广泛的搜索，轴子高达 11 美元——我们认为该最大值与样本中的统一一致。我们确定，对于除少数流形之外的所有流形，QCD 轴子质量正是与模型无关的值，位于 $[0.5, 0.8]$ neV，具体取决于 GUT 规范耦合。该窗口应该是未来集总元件探测器（例如 DMRadio-GUT）的高优先级目标。

我们表明，与 IIB 型轴子结构不同，我们的异质系综中的重轴子群体通常在大爆炸核合成之前衰变，并且可以自然地适应轻子发生。

title: When AdS$_3$ Grows Hair: Boson Stars, Black Holes, and Double-Trace Deformations
abstract: We analyse three-dimensional Einstein gravity coupled to a massive complex scalar field with double-trace boundary conditions. Using high-precision spectral methods, we construct regular AdS$_3$ boson stars together with axisymmetric and non-axisymmetric hairy black holes. For each azimuthal number $m$, the hairy black holes bifurcate from the BTZ family at the corresponding double-trace instability onset. When the double-trace parameter satisfies $\kappa < \kappa_{\rm AdS}$, global AdS$_3$ becomes unstable and we identify its nonlinear endpoint as a zero-frequency boson star with energy below that of AdS$_3$, thereby providing the true ground state of the theory. In the microcanonical ensemble, hairy black holes always carry greater entropy than BTZ at fixed mass and angular momentum, and thus dominate whenever they exist. With notable exceptions, typically hairy black holes do not dominate the canonical nor the grand-canonical ensembles. We further show that, in the singular extremal limit, axisymmetric black holes saturate a generalised minimum-energy theorem under double-trace boundary conditions. These results yield the full nonlinear phase diagram of AdS$_3$ gravity with double-trace deformations.
summary:
我们分析了与具有双迹边界条件的巨大复标量场耦合的三维爱因斯坦引力。使用高精度光谱方法，我们构建了规则的 AdS$_3$ 玻色子星以及轴对称和非轴对称的毛状黑洞。对于每个方位角数 $m$，毛状黑洞在相应的双迹不稳定起始处从 BTZ 家族中分叉。当双迹参数满足$\kappa < \kappa_{\rm AdS}$时，全局AdS$_3$变得不稳定，我们将其非线性端点识别为能量低于AdS$_3$的零频玻色子星，从而提供了理论的真实基态。在微正则系综中，毛状黑洞在固定质量和角动量下总是比 BTZ 携带更大的熵，因此只要它们存在，它们就占据主导地位。除了明显的例外，典型的毛状黑洞并不主导正则或大正则系综。我们进一步表明，在奇异极值极限下，轴对称黑洞在双迹边界条件下饱和广义最小能量定理。

这些结果产生了具有双迹变形的 AdS$_3$ 重力的完整非线性相图。

title: (Pseudo-)Dirac Gravitinos
abstract: We discuss low-energy effective theories with a Dirac gravitino. Our main benchmark is Scherk--Schwarz supersymmetry breaking with anti-periodic boundary conditions for fermions on S^1/Z_2. In this case two Majorana spin-3/2 modes are degenerate, so the low-energy theory is naturally organized around a Dirac gravitino and an associated R-symmetry selection rule. We show, in minimal supergravity, that this Dirac spin-3/2 mixing has no local Dirac-gaugino-type N=1 superspace realization: a superspace description requires projection onto the transverse superspin-3/2 sector. We then analyze some consequences for matter couplings and radiative masses. The ordinary gravitino supercurrent coupling gives the standard universal Scherk--Schwarz scalar threshold; in the minimal benchmark this contribution is negative, and should therefore be regarded as one calculable contribution to the scalar mass matrix, not as a complete scalar-spectrum prediction. Dirac fermion masses can be generated if an additional companion-channel matter current is present. The existence and normalization of this current are not fixed by the Dirac gravitino alone and depend on the ultraviolet completion. We finally discuss small R-breaking deformations, the resulting pseudo-Dirac regime, and comment on possible applications to singlet fermions, modulini, and radiative Dirac neutrino masses.
summary:
我们与狄拉克引力讨论低能有效理论。我们的主要基准是 S^1/Z_2 上费米子的反周期边界条件下的 Scherk--Schwarz 超对称破缺。在这种情况下，两个马约拉纳自旋 3/2 模式是简并的，因此低能理论自然是围绕狄拉克引力和相关的 R 对称选择规则组织的。我们证明，在最小超重力下，这种狄拉克自旋 3/2 混合没有局部狄拉克高吉诺型 N=1 超空间实现：超空间描述需要投影到横向超自旋 3/2 扇区上。然后我们分析物质耦合和辐射质量的一些后果。普通引力超流耦合给出了标准通用的Scherk--Schwarz标量阈值；在最小基准中，这一贡献是负的，因此应被视为对标量质量矩阵的一个可计算贡献，而不是完整的标量谱预测。如果存在额外的伴随通道物质电流，则可以产生狄拉克费米子质量。该电流的存在和标准化并不能仅由狄拉克引力场确定，而是取决于紫外线完成。

最后，我们讨论了小的 R 破断变形、由此产生的伪狄拉克体系，并对单线态费米子、模量和辐射狄拉克中微子质量的可能应用进行了评论。

title: Heterotic Flux Vacua with a Small Superpotential
abstract: We study heterotic Calabi--Yau compactifications with NSNS three-form flux in view of moduli stabilisation and investigate whether the value $|W_0|$ of the flux superpotential evaluated at supersymmetric minima can be small. Unlike in type IIB string theory, heterotic compactifications lack a no-scale structure, so that a non-vanishing flux superpotential generically induces a tree-level scalar potential for all moduli. Controlled moduli stabilisation therefore requires the flux superpotential to be sufficiently small in order to compete with non-perturbative effects. Working within a four-dimensional effective field theory and exploiting the special geometry of Calabi--Yau complex structure moduli spaces, we analyse the complex structure F-term equations and derive two no-go theorems: (1) supersymmetric vacua with vanishing $|W_0|$, which would lead to a vanishing tree-level scalar potential as in type IIB, occur only at singular loci in moduli space, and (2) no supersymmetric vacua with small $|W_0|$ exist in the large complex structure limit. Motivated by these results, we analyse explicit models away from the large complex structure regime using exact period expressions and identify one- and two-parameter examples in which suitable flux choices allow for values of $|W_0|$ of order unity, with some one-parameter models admitting values moderately below unity. Our findings show that small heterotic flux superpotentials are highly constrained, with the values of $|W_0|$ found in the examples studied being only marginally compatible with moduli stabilisation.
summary:
我们从模量稳定的角度研究了具有 NSNS 三型通量的异质 Calabi-Yau 致密化，并研究了在超对称最小值处评估的通量超势值 $|W_0|$ 是否可以很小。与 IIB 型弦理论不同，异质紧化缺乏无尺度结构，因此非零通量超势通常会引发所有模的树级标量势。因此，受控模量稳定性要求通量超电势足够小，以便与非微扰效应竞争。在四维有效场理论中，利用 Calabi-Yau 复数结构模空间的特殊几何结构，我们分析了复数结构 F 项方程，并推导了两个不可行定理：（1）$|W_0|$ 消失的超对称真空，这将导致 IIB 型中的树级标量势消失，仅出现在模空间中的奇异位点处；（2）不存在具有小 $|W_0|$ 的超对称真空。 $|W_0|$ exist in the large complex structure limit.

受这些结果的启发，我们使用精确的周期表达式分析远离大型复杂结构状态的显式模型，并识别一参数和二参数示例，其中合适的通量选择允许 $|W_0|$ 阶次统一的值，一些单参数模型允许稍微低于统一的值。我们的研究结果表明，小的杂优势通量超势受到高度限制，在研究的示例中发现的 $|W_0|$ 值仅与模量稳定性略微兼容。

title: Consistent Scattering Amplitudes, Yang-Mills, the Higgs Mechanism and the EFTs Beyond
abstract: I study constraints on fundamental physics emerging from consistency of a unitary, local and perturbative $S$-matrix in $4d$. For massless particles, some new constraints arising from consistent complex factorisation of $2\rightarrow 2$ amplitudes are derived, leading, in particular, to the complete structure of the gluon three-particle amplitudes, including the geometric restrictions on the Lie algebra, parity and time-reversal symmetry, among other details. For massive particles, a hierarchy of constraints may be derived instead by imposing a maximum rate of unitarity-violating growth in the high energy limit. All $2\rightarrow 2$ tree-level amplitudes of massive particles with spin $s\leq 1$ are calculated in generality using on-shell methods and presented with manifest high energy dependence. The anatomy of these amplitudes' helicity sectors is dissected in order to identify conditions under which their energy growth is limited or eliminated. Using these results, it is shown that the scattering of massive vector bosons has suppressed, but not fully unitarised, high energy dependence if the parity-conserving parts of their self-couplings are Lie algebra structure constants, possibly non-semisimple or non-compact, and the parity-violating parts are ``generalised Chern-Simons terms''. Full unitarisation then requires the standard Yang-Mills Lie algebra properties and, for a gapped spectrum, the Higgs mechanism. These amplitudes are assembled, embedded and unified into elegant superamplitudes in theories with extended supersymmetry when the particles are BPS. More generally, a broader landscape of EFTs is charted through various combinations of constraints and coupling hierarchies.
summary:
我研究了 $4d$ 中酉局部微扰 $S$ 矩阵的一致性对基础物理的约束。对于无质量粒子，推导了 $2\rightarrow 2$ 振幅的一致复数分解所产生的一些新约束，特别是导致了胶子三粒子振幅的完整结构，包括李代数、宇称和时间反转对称性的几何限制等细节。对于大质量粒子，可以通过在高能量极限下施加最大违反单位增长速率来导出约束层次。自旋 $s\leq 1$ 的大质量粒子的所有 $2\rightarrow 2$ 树级振幅均使用壳上方法进行一般性计算，并具有明显的高能量依赖性。对这些振幅的螺旋扇区进行解剖，以确定其能量增长受到限制或消除的条件。

使用这些结果表明，如果自耦合的宇称守恒部分是李代数结构常数（可能是非半简单或非紧的），并且宇称破坏部分是“广义陈-西蒙斯项”，则大质量矢量玻色子的散射会抑制但不完全酉化高能量依赖性。完全的酉化需要标准的杨-米尔斯李代数性质，对于有隙谱，还需要希格斯机制。当粒子为 BPS 时，这些振幅在具有扩展超对称性的理论中被组装、嵌入并统一为优雅的超振幅。更一般地说，更广泛的 EFT 景观是通过约束和耦合层次结构的各种组合来绘制的。

title: The nonlocal magic of a holographic Schwinger pair
abstract: We analyze the emergence of nonlocal magic in Schwinger pair creation in strong non-Abelian (chromo)electric fields using holography. The produced quark--antiquark pair is entangled into a color singlet, yet accelerates into causally disconnected Rindler wedges. Using the Casini--Huerta--Myers conformal mapping and the probe-brane framework, we compute the refined Rényi entropy and its derivative, which captures the antiflatness of the entanglement spectrum for a spherical bipartition. We find that for boundary spacetime dimension $d>2$, the entanglement spectrum is non-flat, implying the dynamical generation of nonlocal magic in the pair creation process. Interestingly, the nonlocal magic in the holographic dual can be obtained from the free energy of the probe action.
summary: 我们使用全息术分析了强非阿贝尔（色）电场中施温格对生成中非局域魔法的出现。产生的夸克-反夸克对纠缠成彩色单线态，但加速成因果不相连的林德勒楔子。使用 Casini--Huerta--Myers 共形映射和探针膜框架，我们计算了精炼的 Rényi 熵及其导数，它捕获了球面二分的纠缠谱的反平坦性。我们发现，对于边界时空维度$d>2$，纠缠谱是非平坦的，这意味着在配对创建过程中动态生成非局域魔法。有趣的是，全息对偶中的非局域魔力可以从探针动作的自由能中获得。

title: Particle Production and Krylov Complexity of Circular Strings Near Black Hole Horizons
abstract: For an infalling circular string, we study particle production, Krylov complexity, Lanczos coefficients, and operator growth induced by quantum fluctuations. Using canonical quantization in the squeezed state formalism, we show that significant particle production arises only in the radial sector as the string approaches the black hole horizon, while angular modes remain weakly excited. Exploiting the equivalence between particle number and Krylov complexity for two mode states, we find that nontrivial complexity scaling emerges only in the near-horizon, effectively thermalized regime, where the state approaches a thermofield double form. In this limit, the particle number exhibits a polynomial dependence on the initial position of the probe string. We further identify a linear dependence of the operator growth rate on the initial position of the probe string, suggesting a universal scaling behavior of operator growth and providing support for the complexity volume correspondence.
summary: 对于内落圆弦，我们研究粒子产生、Krylov 复杂度、Lanczos 系数和量子涨落引起的算子增长。使用压缩态形式主义中的正则量子化，我们表明，当弦接近黑洞视界时，仅在径向扇区中出现显着的粒子产生，而角模式仍然处于弱激发状态。利用两种模式状态的粒子数和克雷洛夫复杂度之间的等价性，我们发现非平凡的复杂度缩放仅出现在近地平线、有效热化状态中，其中状态接近热场双重形式。在此限制下，粒子数表现出对探针串初始位置的多项式依赖性。我们进一步确定了算子增长率对探针串初始位置的线性依赖性，表明算子增长的通用缩放行为并为复杂性体积对应提供支持。

title: New Exponential and Polynomial $ξ$-attractors
abstract: We introduce a new family of cosmological attractors with non-minimal coupling of gravity and non-canonical kinetic terms. In the Einstein frame, these models transform into a class of exponential and polynomial attractors with the spectral index $n_{s}$ spanning a broad range $1-2/N \leq n_{s} < 1-1/N$, and $r$ can decrease to zero in the limit $\xi \to \infty$. This is sufficient to match any combination of Planck, BICEP/Keck, ACT, SPT, and DESI data. We present a supergravity implementation of these models.
summary: 我们引入了一个新的宇宙吸引子家族，其具有重力和非规范动力学项的非最小耦合。在爱因斯坦框架中，这些模型转化为一类指数和多项式吸引子，其谱索引 $n_{s}$ 跨越广泛的范围 $1-2/N \leq n_{s} < 1-1/N$，并且 $r$ 可以在 $\xi \to \infty$ 的极限内减小到零。这足以匹配 Planck、BICEP/Keck、ACT、SPT 和 DESI 数据的任意组合。我们提出了这些模型的超重力实现。

title: Bound states and deconfinement from Romans supergravity with magnetic flux
abstract: We apply the dictionary of gauge-gravity dualities to study the spectrum of bound states in a special one-parameter family of strongly coupled, confining field theories in four dimensions. The top-down, holographic gravity dual description of this class of theories has been identified recently. It consists of non-supersymmetric regular background solutions of Romans half-maximal supergravity theory in six dimensions, in the presence of a non-trivial Abelian magnetic flux along a compactified direction of the geometry. A zero-temperature, deconfinement, first-order phase transition appears at one end of this branch of solutions. It is triggered by the strength of the flux, setting an upper bound on the magnitude of the magnetic flux that can be supported by the geometry. We compute the spectrum of fluctuations of the background fields in the gravity description, that correspond to field-theory bound states. Two scalar particles are the lightest in the spectrum, their masses being suppressed and almost degenerate across the whole parameter space. Away from the transition, the heaviest between these two particles is identified as a dilaton, the pseudo-Nambu-Goldstone boson associated with scale invariance. It couples to the trace of the stress-energy tensor of the dual field theory, while the lightest scalar does not. In the range of parameter space closest to the extremum of the one-parameter family, near the first-order phase transition, a region with large curvature appears at the end of space of the geometry of the solutions. In this range, the two scalars mix non-trivially, and their masses are parametrically suppressed, in respect to the other bound states.
summary:
我们应用规范引力二元性字典来研究四维强耦合、限制场论的特殊单参数族中的束缚态谱。最近已经确定了此类理论的自上而下的全息引力双重描述。它由罗马半极大超重力理论在六维中的非超对称正则背景解组成，存在沿着几何的压缩方向的非平凡阿贝尔磁通量。零温度、解除限制、一级相变出现在该解决方案分支的一端。它由磁通量的强度触发，设置几何形状可支持的磁通量大小的上限。我们计算重力描述中背景场的波动谱，其对应于场论束缚态。两个标量粒子是光谱中最轻的，它们的质量被抑制，并且在整个参数空间中几乎退化。

远离转变，这两个粒子之间最重的粒子被认为是膨胀子，即与尺度不变性相关的伪南部戈德斯通玻色子。它与对偶场理论的应力-能量张量的迹耦合，而最轻的标量则不然。在最接近单参数族极值的参数空间范围内，在一阶相变附近，解的几何空间末端出现一个大曲率区域。在此范围内，两个标量不平凡地混合，并且相对于其他束缚态，它们的质量被参数抑制。

title: Molien--Weyl Singlet Counting and BFSS$_2$--Factorization in Gaussian Matrix QM
abstract: We study the singlet-sector structure of mass-deformed BFSS$_{d+1}$ matrix quantum mechanics by combining the large--\(d\) Gaussian reduction with the Molien--Weyl projection. The Gaussian reduction captures the bulk matrix dynamics through a gauged harmonic oscillator, while the Molien--Weyl integral imposes the Gauss law and reorganizes the physical Hilbert space into holonomy-projected singlet excitations. We show that the very-low-temperature bosonic singlet spectrum is universally controlled by the quadratic Gram operators \(\Tr(X_aX_b)\), whose number is \(d(d+1)/2\). For \(N=2\), this result is established by explicit residue computations and character methods; for \(N>2\), it is supported by the character analysis. Thus the infrared spectrum begins as a collection of BFSS$_2$--like Gram towers, although higher invariant structures generally modify the full partition function. We also give a Hamiltonian derivation of the exceptional exact factorization at \((d,N)=(2,2)\), where the BFSS$_3$ singlet partition function equals the cube of the BFSS$_2$ one for all temperatures. This rigidity is special to the \(SU(2)\) invariant tensor structure and explains why \(d=1\) and \(N=2\) are exceptional regimes without a deconfinement crossover. Finally, we extend the Gram-counting picture to supersymmetric BFSS/BMN models and indicate how the Molien--Weyl formulation can benchmark Monte Carlo simulations in both \(X_a\)-space and holonomy space.
summary:
我们通过将大-\(d\)高斯约简与Molien--Weyl投影相结合，研究了质量变形BFSS$_{d+1}$矩阵量子力学的单重态扇区结构。高斯约简通过计量谐振子捕获体矩阵动力学，而莫林-韦尔积分则强加高斯定律并将物理希尔伯特空间重新组织为完整投影单重态激励。我们证明了极低温玻色子单重态谱普遍受二次格拉姆算子 \(\Tr(X_aX_b)\) 控制，其数量为 \(d(d+1)/2\)。对于\(N=2\)，这个结果是通过显式留数计算和特征方法建立的；对于\(N>2\)，它得到了字符分析的支持。因此，红外光谱开始时是 BFSS$_2$ 的集合——类似格拉姆塔，尽管更高的不变结构通常会修改完整的配分函数。我们还给出了在 \((d,N)=(2,2)\) 处的异常精确分解的哈密顿推导，其中 BFSS$_3$ 单态配分函数等于所有温度下 BFSS$_2$ 的立方。

这种刚性对于\(SU(2)\)不变张量结构来说是特殊的，并解释了为什么\(d=1\)和\(N=2\)是没有解除限制交叉的特殊机制。最后，我们将克计数图扩展到超对称 BFSS/BMN 模型，并指出 Molien--Weyl 公式如何在 \(X_a\) 空间和完整空间中对蒙特卡罗模拟进行基准测试。

title: Expectation values after an integrable boundary quantum quench
abstract: We investigate an integrable boundary quench, in which one integrable boundary condition is suddenly switched to another. We develop a general framework for analyzing the resulting real-time dynamics based on form factors of bulk and boundary-changing operators. We first study the problem at the conformal point of the Lee-Yang model and then extend the analysis to its massive perturbation, where we examine the time evolution of the pre-quench vacuum and compute the vacuum-to-vacuum matrix elements of local operators inserted after the quench. The analytical results are validated by numerical calculations using the truncated conformal space approach adapted to boundary-changing situations.
summary: 我们研究了一种可积边界淬灭，其中一个可积边界条件突然切换到另一个。我们开发了一个通用框架，用于根据批量和边界变化算子的形状因素来分析由此产生的实时动态。我们首先研究 Lee-Yang 模型共角点的问题，然后将分析扩展到其大规模扰动，其中我们检查淬火前真空的时间演化，并计算淬火后插入的局部算子的真空到真空矩阵元素。使用适应边界变化情况的截断共形空间方法通过数值计算验证了分析结果。

title: Kerr/CFT Traversable Wormhole with Fermionic Double-Trace Deformation
abstract: The construction of a traversable wormhole with double-trace deformation has been achieved so far by using boson fields as the perturbation. In this work, we study double-trace deformation with fermion fields in the two-sided Kerr background to open a traversable wormhole. We construct the fermionic double-trace deformation within the Kerr/CFT framework. We consider the near-horizon, near-extremal Kerr geometry, which is dual to a conformal field theory. The lack of fermionic superradiance let us describe the wormhole at every region, even at the off-axis region where bosonic field experiences instability due to superradiance. By choosing a certain coupling between the left and right boundaries, the two-point function is modified, and its first order correction contributes the negative energy to open the wormhole. The wormhole is most traversable when the perturbation is turned on at early times, with opening that depends on the mode's frequency, the black hole temperature, and the fermion mass. At late times, the average null energy has damped oscillation behavior until eventually reaches zero. Wormhole with lower temperature have less traversability and it is completely closed at extreme limit. On the other hand, rotation near extreme limit can increases the upper bound on information transfer up to the order of the entropy. Additionally, symmetrical effective potential bumps connected by the wormhole can produce observable echoes. We find that the echo time delay cannot exceed the scrambling time of the black hole.
summary:
目前已经实现了以玻色子场为扰动的可穿越双迹变形虫洞的构建。在这项工作中，我们研究了两侧克尔背景中费米子场的双迹变形，以打开可穿越的虫洞。我们在 Kerr/CFT 框架内构建了费米子双迹变形。我们考虑近地平线、近极值克尔几何，它与共形场论是对偶的。由于缺乏费米子超辐射，我们可以描述每个区域的虫洞，甚至在离轴区域，玻色子场由于超辐射而不稳定。通过选择左右边界之间的一定耦合，对两点函数进行修正，其一阶修正贡献了打开虫洞的负能量。当扰动在早期开启时，虫洞最容易穿越，其开口取决于模式的频率、黑洞温度和费米子质量。在后期，平均零能量抑制了振荡行为，直到最终达到零。

温度较低的虫洞，其穿越性较小，在极限时完全封闭。另一方面，接近极限的旋转可以将信息传输的上限增加到熵的量级。此外，由虫洞连接的对称有效电位凸起可以产生可观察到的回声。我们发现回波时间延迟不能超过黑洞的扰乱时间。

title: Gravitational multipoles from scattering amplitudes in higher dimensions
abstract: We investigate the gravitational multipole structure derived from scattering amplitudes in both four- and higher-dimensional spacetimes, with particular focus on the five-dimensional case. We develop a systematic procedure to extract multipole data from scattering amplitudes in arbitrary dimensions. In four dimensions, only two independent multipole moments exist: mass and current moments. In this setting, we analyze the coupling of massive spin-1 and spin-3/2 fields to gravity, showing how the quadrupole and octupole structure of the Kerr solution arises from minimally coupled theories. We then extend the analysis to include non-minimal couplings, deriving the most general rotating solution with spin-induced multipoles up to octupole order. In higher dimensions, an additional infinite family of ``stress'' multipole moments arises. Focusing on the five-dimensional case, we consider both a massive vector and a massive antisymmetric tensor coupled to gravity, and show that the resulting quadrupolar structure is qualitatively different: while the vector field produces only a mass quadrupole, the antisymmetric tensor generates only a stress quadrupole. By computing the corresponding stress-energy tensor, we demonstrate that minimally coupled theories fail to reproduce the multipolar structure of the Myers-Perry solution. This provides a direct manifestation of the breakdown of spin universality in higher dimensions.
summary:
我们研究了四维和更高维时空中的散射振幅衍生的引力多极结构，特别关注五维情况。我们开发了一种系统程序，可以从任意维度的散射振幅中提取多极数据。在四个维度中，仅存在两个独立的多极矩：质量矩和电流矩。在这种情况下，我们分析了大规模自旋 1 和自旋 3/2 场与重力的耦合，展示了克尔解的四极和八极结构如何从最小耦合理论中产生。然后，我们将分析扩展到包括非最小耦合，得出最通用的旋转解，其中自旋诱导多极直至八极级。在更高的维度中，会出现额外的无限“应力”多极矩家族。着眼于五维情况，我们考虑与重力耦合的大质量矢量和大反对称张量，并表明所得到的四极结构在本质上是不同的：矢量场仅产生质量四极，而反对称张量仅产生应力四极。

通过计算相应的应力-能量张量，我们证明最小耦合理论无法重现迈尔斯-佩里解的多极结构。这提供了更高维度中自旋普遍性崩溃的直接表现。

title: Time-Fractional Schrödinger Evolution in Coupled Double Quantum Dots: Memory Effects on Quantum Resources
abstract: Our work explore the time evolution of entanglement, local quantum uncertainty, and correlated coherence, within a system modeled by two double quantum dots. The dynamics is represented using a time-fractional Schrödinger equation, which includes memory effects in a non-Markovian regime. We vary the fractional parameter $\tau$, the tunneling amplitudes $\delta_A$ and $\delta_B$, as well as the inter-dot interaction strength $\mathcal{V}$, to investigate how these key parameters govern the generation, stabilization, and decay of quantum resources within the system. The obtained results reveal that, for both initial states, fractional dynamics with a low $\tau$ rapidly generates entanglement expecting maximal values $\mathcal{LN}\approx 1$ and non-classical correlations quantified by local quantum uncertainty. Conversely, higher values of $\tau$ lead to slower entanglement but memory effects allow quantum resources to remain significant for a longer time, with the negativity remaining above ($\approx 0.6$). We also find that higher interaction frequencies $\mathcal{V}$ accelerate correlations and stabilize coherence, while a strong tunneling asymmetry degrades entanglement and coherence despite the initial benefits of increasing quantum resources.
summary:
我们的工作探索了由两个双量子点建模的系统中纠缠、局部量子不确定性和相关相干性的时间演化。动力学使用时间分数薛定谔方程表示，其中包括非马尔可夫状态中的记忆效应。我们改变分数参数$\tau$、隧道振幅$\delta_A$和$\delta_B$以及点间相互作用强度$\mathcal{V}$，以研究这些关键参数如何控制系统内量子资源的生成、稳定和衰变。获得的结果表明，对于两种初始状态，具有低 $\tau$ 的分数动力学快速生成纠缠，期望最大值 $\mathcal{LN}\approx 1$ 和通过局部量子不确定性量化的非经典相关性。相反，较高的 $\tau$ 值会导致较慢的纠缠，但记忆效应允许量子资源在较长时间内保持显着性，负值仍高于（$\约 0.6$）。

我们还发现，较高的相互作用频率 $\mathcal{V}$ 会加速相关性并稳定相干性，而强烈的隧道不对称性会降低纠缠和相干性，尽管增加量子资源最初带来了好处。

title: Subleading Chern-Simons soft factors in perturbative de Sitter
abstract: Chern-Simons perturbations introduce corrections to soft theorems for gauge theories at subleading $\mathcal{O}\left(\omega^0\right)$ order in soft momenta. We investigate these soft theorems in flat spacetime with perturbative $1/\ell^2$ de Sitter corrections. Following previous works, we define the perturbative scattering matrix in a compact region in the static patch of de Sitter. We show that Chern-Simons corrections do not mix with the $1/\ell^2$ de Sitter curvature corrections at subleading order $\mathcal{O}\left(\omega^0\right)$. Alternatively, one can say that the subleading Chern-Simons soft factors are insensitive to the de Sitter curvature at this order, indicating their topological nature at the level of amplitudes. This also suggests a universal behavior of these Chern-Simons soft factors.
summary: Chern-Simons 扰动引入了对规范理论软动量中 $\mathcal{O}\left(\omega^0\right)$ 阶软定理的修正。我们通过扰动 $1/\ell^2$ de Sitter 修正研究平坦时空中的这些软定理。继之前的工作之后，我们在德西特静态斑块的紧凑区域中定义了微扰散射矩阵。我们证明 Chern-Simons 校正不会与次领先阶 $\mathcal{O}\left(\omega^0\right)$ 的 $1/\ell^2$ de Sitter 曲率校正混合。或者，可以说次领先陈-西蒙斯软因子对这一阶的德西特曲率不敏感，表明它们在振幅水平上的拓扑性质。这也表明这些陈-西蒙斯软因素的普遍行为。

title: Quantum Entanglement in the Dirac Field Quantization around Charged Black Holes
abstract: We investigate the quantum entanglement properties of the Dirac field near a charged Reissner--Nordström black hole, incorporating the effects of Hawking radiation within the framework of quantum field theory in curved spacetime. Using concurrence \( C \) and Bures distance \( B \) as measures of entanglement, we analyze how quantum correlations evolve with respect to the electric charge \( Q \) of the black hole, the frequency \( \omega \) of fermionic modes, and the initial entanglement angle \( \theta \). Our results show that the electric charge \( Q \) enhances decoherence inside the event horizon while, counterintuitively, temporarily increasing accessible entanglement outside. The Hawking effect induces an apparent loss of entanglement for an external observer, due to correlation transfer to inaccessible regions. High-frequency modes \( \omega \) exhibit greater resilience to gravitational effects, maintaining robust correlations near the horizon. These findings highlight the redistribution of entanglement in a multipartite system in curved spacetime, with significant implications for quantum information in relativistic and gravitational contexts.
summary: 我们研究带电赖斯纳-诺德斯特伦黑洞附近狄拉克场的量子纠缠性质，将霍金辐射的效应纳入弯曲时空量子场论的框架内。使用并发度\(C\)和布雷斯距离\(B\)作为纠缠的度量，我们分析了量子相关性如何相对于黑洞的电荷\(Q\)、费米子模式的频率\(\omega\)和初始纠缠角\(\theta\)演化。我们的结果表明，电荷 \( Q \) 增强了事件视界内的退相干性，同时与直觉相反，暂时增加了事件视界外可及的纠缠。由于相关性转移到难以到达的区域，霍金效应导致外部观察者明显失去纠缠。高频模式 \( \omega \) 对引力效应表现出更大的弹性，在地平线附近保持强大的相关性。这些发现强调了弯曲时空多部分系统中纠缠的重新分布，对相对论和引力背景下的量子信息具有重大意义。

title: On the generalized Komar charge of supersymmetric solutions
abstract: We consider the supersymmetric solutions of several supergravity theories (ungauged $\mathcal{N}=2,d=4$ and $\mathcal{N}=1,d=5$ supergravities coupled to vector supermultiplets and pure $\mathcal{N}=1,d=10$ supergravity) and show that their generalized Komar charges vanish identically for the supersymmetric Killing vector which is constructed as a bilinear of the Killing spinors of those solutions. This property can be used to prove the supersymmetry (``BPS'') bounds satisfied by some of those solutions in a rigorous, coordinate-independent way.
summary: 我们考虑了几种超重力理论的超对称解（未计量的 $\mathcal{N}=2,d=4$ 和 $\mathcal{N}=1,d=5$ 超重力耦合到矢量超多重态和纯 $\mathcal{N}=1,d=10$ 超重力），并表明它们的广义 Komar 电荷对于超对称 Killing 矢量同样消失，该超对称 Killing 矢量被构造为这些解的 Killing 旋量的双线性。该属性可用于以严格的、与坐标无关的方式证明其中一些解满足的超对称性（“BPS”）界限。

title: Remarks on pairwise comparisons, transition amplitudes, and qubit states
abstract: We discuss a pairwise-comparison viewpoint on finite families of qubit states. Starting from transition amplitudes between pure states, we distinguish three associated levels of comparison data: complex amplitudes, transition probabilities, and phase-valued pairwise comparisons. In the non-orthogonal case, the phase data define a \(U(1)\)-valued reciprocal pairwise comparison structure. We show that the corresponding triangular defects are naturally related to normalized Bargmann invariants and therefore to geometric phases. This gives a simple interpretation of inconsistency-type quantities in terms of quantum kinematics. We also comment on realizability constraints coming from Gram matrices of rank at most two, and on the passage from unitary phase data to more general transition data. The aim of the paper is mainly conceptual: to isolate a common language between pairwise comparisons and elementary quantum geometry.
summary: 我们讨论有限量子位态族的成对比较观点。从纯状态之间的跃迁幅度开始，我们区分了比较数据的三个相关级别：复幅度、跃迁概率和相位值成对比较。在非正交情况下，相位数据定义了一个\(U(1)\)值的倒数成对比较结构。我们表明，相应的三角形缺陷自然与归一化巴格曼不变量相关，因此与几何相位相关。这给出了量子运动学方面不一致性类型量的简单解释。我们还评论了来自秩最多为 2 的 Gram 矩阵的可实现性约束，以及从酉相数据到更一般的转变数据的转变。本文的目的主要是概念性的：隔离成对比较和基本量子几何之间的共同语言。

title: Quantum Dynamics: A Dilation-Based Approach
abstract: In the study of open quantum systems, one commonly describes the evolution of a system of interest through reduced dynamics, obtained by treating the environment indirectly rather than as a part of the full model. This thesis presents an expository account of an alternative, dilation-based viewpoint in the finite-dimensional setting, where a family of reduced dynamics is represented through unitary evolution on a larger system consisting of the original system together with an ancillary environment.
