After reviewing the reduced-dynamics perspective and the language of quantum channels, we formulate finite-dimensional quantum dynamics as channel-valued dynamical curves and use this framework to discuss Stinespring dilations of such curves. We then present exact dilation results for analytic dynamical curves, explain the singular behavior that can arise at t=0, and describe approximation results showing that Lipschitz-continuous dynamical curves admit approximate finite-dimensional Stinespring dilations. The thesis therefore provides a mathematically focused introduction to dilation-based modeling of quantum dynamics and argues that a change of perspective can lead to new ways of formulating problems in the theory of open quantum systems.
summary:
在开放量子系统的研究中，人们通常通过减少动力学来描述感兴趣的系统的演化，这是通过间接处理环境而不是作为完整模型的一部分来获得的。本论文提出了有限维环境中另一种基于扩张的观点的解释性说明，其中通过在由原始系统和辅助环境组成的更大系统上的单一演化来表示一系列简化的动力学。在回顾了简化动力学观点和量子通道语言之后，我们将有限维量子动力学表述为通道值动力学曲线，并使用该框架来讨论此类曲线的 Stinespring 膨胀。然后，我们提出解析动力学曲线的精确膨胀结果，解释 t=0 时可能出现的奇异行为，并描述近似结果，显示 Lipschitz 连续动力学曲线允许近似有限维 Stinespring 膨胀。

因此，本文对基于膨胀的量子动力学建模提供了数学上的重点介绍，并认为视角的改变可以带来在开放量子系统理论中表述问题的新方法。

title: Anchored random clusters and SLE excursions
abstract: We provide a pedagogical review of CFT techniques to compute certain Schramm-Loewner Evolution (SLE) observables in the upper half-plane. The approach relies on the ability to express the observables as bulk-boundary correlation functions that involve degenerate boundary operators and, therefore, obey certain differential equations. In particular, we recover Schramm's left-passage probability for SLE, the SLE Green's functions, and the generalized densities of ``anchored'' critical percolation clusters first obtained by Kleban, Simmons, and Ziff. We also obtain new formulas corresponding to the densities of pivotal points between critical Fortuin-Kasteleyn (FK) clusters.
summary: 我们对计算上半平面中某些 Schramm-Loewner 演化 (SLE) 可观测量的 CFT 技术进行了教学回顾。该方法依赖于将可观测量表示为涉及简并边界算子的体边界相关函数的能力，因此服从某些微分方程。特别是，我们恢复了 SLE 的 Schramm 左通过概率、SLE 格林函数以及 Kleban、Simmons 和 Ziff 首先获得的“锚定”临界渗流簇的广义密度。我们还获得了与关键 Fortuin-Kasteleyn (FK) 簇之间的关键点密度相对应的新公式。

title: Time-Dependent Dynamical Dimensional Transmutation in the $SU(2)$ Gross-Neveu Model with Time-Dependent Interaction Strength
abstract: In this work we consider the time-dependent $SU(2)$ Gross-Neveu model, which is a quantum field theory of fermions which interact with each other through spin exchange interaction with time-dependent coupling strength $g(t)$. Using the recently formulated generalized Bethe ansatz framework, we show that the system is integrable provided the time-dependent coupling strength is such that its trajectories in time are exactly same as that of the renormalization group (RG) flow equations corresponding to the static model, where time `$t$' of the time-dependent model is identified with the logarithm of the cutoff `$\ln \Lambda$' of the static model. In the scaling regime $\Lambda\rightarrow\infty$, the above relation between time and the logarithm of the cutoff provides a characteristic time scale $t_0$. We analyze the exact time-dependent wavefunction in the case of coupling strength decreasing with time and show that in the adiabatic regime, which corresponds to $t\sim t_0$ for drive rate $\alpha_0=1$, the system exhibits a time-dependent dynamical dimensional transmutation where a time dependent mass gap is generated, which at time $t=t_0+\Delta t$ is given by $m(\Delta t)=m_0 e^{-\pi\alpha_0\Delta t}$, where $m_0=\Lambda e^{-\pi \alpha_0 t_0}$. Comparing this with the mass gap of the static model, we identify the adiabatic regime of the time-dependent model with the scaling regime of the static model. In the case of very large time scales $t\gg t_0$ for drive rate $\alpha_0$ or for very fast drive rates $\alpha$ such that $\alpha t \gg \alpha_0t_0$, for any $t<L$, we argue that the system is asymptotically free and approaches the $SU(2)_1$ Wess-Zumino-Novikov-Witten (WZNW) model, which corresponds to the UV fixed point of the $SU(2)$ Gross-Neveu model. Hence we establish that progression of time in the time-dependent model is equivalent to RG flow in the corresponding static model.
summary:
在这项工作中，我们考虑时间相关的 $SU(2)$ Gross-Neveu 模型，它是费米子的量子场论，费米子通过自旋交换相互作用与时间相关的耦合强度 $g(t)$ 相互作用。使用最近制定的广义 Bethe ansatz 框架，我们表明系统是可积的，只要瞬态耦合强度使得其时间轨迹与静态模型对应的重正化群 (RG) 流方程完全相同，其中瞬态模型的时间“$t$”用静态模型的截止值“$\ln \Lambda$”的对数来标识。在标度体系 $\Lambda\rightarrow\infty$ 中，上述时间与截止对数之间的关系提供了特征时间标度 $t_0$。

我们分析了耦合强度随时间减小的情况下的精确时间相关波函数，并表明在绝热状态下，对应于驱动速率 $\alpha_0=1$ 的 $t\sim t_0$，系统表现出时间相关的动态尺寸嬗变，其中生成时间相关的质量间隙，在时间 $t=t_0+\Delta t$ 由 $m(\Delta t)=m_0 给出e^{-\pi\alpha_0\Delta t}$，其中 $m_0=\Lambda e^{-\pi \alpha_0 t_0}$。将其与静态模型的质量间隙进行比较，我们将瞬态模型的绝热状态与静态模型的标度状态进行识别。在非常大的时间尺度 $t\gg t_0$ 驱动速率 $\alpha_0$ 或非常快的驱动速率 $\alpha$ 使得 $\alpha t \gg \alpha_0t_0$ 的情况下，对于任何 $t<L$，我们认为系统是渐近自由的并且接近 $SU(2)_1$ Wess-Zumino-Novikov-Witten (WZNW) 模型，该模型对应于$SU(2)$ Gross-Neveu 模型。因此，我们确定时间相关模型中的时间进展等效于相应静态模型中的 RG 流。

title: Quantum Algorithms for Magic Square Diophantine Equations
abstract: Magic-square constraints define Diophantine systems whose solutions, in several natural families, exhibit rigid periodic structure. We study this structure in an oracle setting, where a marked set of integers is given by black-box access and the goal is to decide whether it encodes a magic square. For $3\times 3$ magic squares and weighted variants, we prove explicit periodic characterizations that reduce detection to period finding. For larger orders, we identify a class of solutions built from repeated arithmetic patterns, which can be detected via the quantum Fourier transform. We then introduce a shifted-oracle method, based on interference between an oracle and its translates, that helps reconstruct solutions in structured cases. Together, these ingredients give a quantum framework for detecting and reconstructing certain magic-square solutions under suitable assumptions. We also derive finite bounds that make some instances exhaustively solvable and obtain Shor-based criteria for certifying non-existence in restricted number-theoretic settings. As an application, we sketch a quantum communication protocol based on an oracle encoding of a large magic-square solution.
summary: 幻方约束定义了丢番图系统，其解在几个自然族中表现出严格的周期结构。我们在预言机环境中研究这种结构，其中通过黑盒访问给出一组标记的整数，目标是确定它是否编码幻方。对于 $3\times 3$ 幻方和加权变体，我们证明了显式的周期性特征，可以将检测减少到周期发现。对于更大的订单，我们确定了一类由重复算术模式构建的解决方案，这些解决方案可以通过量子傅里叶变换来检测。然后，我们引入一种基于预言与其翻译之间的干扰的移位预言方法，该方法有助于在结构化情况下重建解决方案。这些成分共同提供了一个量子框架，用于在适当的假设下检测和重建某些幻方解。我们还推导了有限界限，使某些实例可以彻底解决，并获得基于肖尔的标准来证明在受限数论设置中不存在。作为一个应用程序，我们草拟了一个基于大型幻方解决方案的预言机编码的量子通信协议。

title: Emergent Quantum Dynamics as a Bayesian Inference Problem: A Critical Analysis
abstract: Coarse-grained descriptions can be used to account for physical processes in which information is lost or not entirely accessible. In this paper, we start by proposing a connection between effective, coarse-grained descriptions of quantum dynamics and the quantum conditional states formalism. In doing so, we address necessary and sufficient conditions for the existence of emergent dynamics from a subjective Bayesian point of view. Although our solution is (quasi-)optimal, the dynamics it determines are shown to be analytically limited -- it solves the problem in a state-by-state case. Due to this limitation, we then implement semidefinite programming techniques to investigate the existence of effective dynamics in four paradigmatic scenarios. The existence of such an effective dynamics motivates the introduction of a new robustness measure that quantifies how much noise can be added to a microscopic dynamics without compromising its compatibility with a given coarse-grained description. Finally, we also show how one can analytically determine a valid emergent description in several examples.
summary: 粗粒度描述可用于解释信息丢失或无法完全访问的物理过程。在本文中，我们首先提出量子动力学的有效、粗粒度描述与量子条件态形式主义之间的联系。在此过程中，我们从主观贝叶斯的角度解决了涌现动态存在的必要和充分条件。尽管我们的解决方案是（准）最优的，但它所确定的动态在分析上是有限的——它解决了逐个状态情况下的问题。由于这一限制，我们随后实施半定规划技术来研究四种范例场景中有效动态的存在性。这种有效动力学的存在促使引入一种新的鲁棒性度量，该度量可以量化可以添加到微观动力学中的噪声量，而不会影响其与给定粗粒度描述的兼容性。最后，我们还展示了如何在几个示例中分析确定有效的紧急描述。

title: Multiparameter function estimation for general Hamiltonians
abstract: Estimation of physical parameters encoded in a Hamiltonian is a central task in quantum sensing and learning. While the ultimate precision limit for estimating a single parameter coupled to a single generator is well established, the corresponding bound for estimating a function of multiple parameters-each coupled to distinct and possibly non-commuting generators-remains unknown in general. Here, we derive the ultimate quantum limit and present an estimation protocol for any function of parameters in a general Hamiltonian that attains this bound. We show that, although the task is fundamentally a multiparameter problem, our tight bound reduces to an optimized single-parameter quantum Cramér-Rao bound, even for arbitrary generator sets. Our result unifies and extends previous works, providing a general framework for optimal function estimation in quantum systems.
summary: 估计哈密顿量编码的物理参数是量子传感和学习的核心任务。虽然估计耦合到单个发电机的单个参数的最终精度限制已经确定，但估计多个参数的函数（每个参数耦合到不同且可能不通勤的发电机）的相应界限通常仍然未知。在这里，我们推导了最终的量子极限，并为达到该极限的一般哈密顿量中的任何参数函数提出了估计协议。我们表明，虽然该任务从根本上来说是一个多参数问题，但我们的紧界简化为优化的单参数量子 Cramér-Rao 界，即使对于任意生成器组也是如此。我们的结果统一并扩展了之前的工作，为量子系统中的最优函数估计提供了通用框架。

title: Tunneling from an oscillating initial state in quantum mechanics
abstract: We study the decay of general initial states out of a metastable potential well in quantum mechanics. We provide a closed-form expression for the probability current that tunnels through the barrier in terms of the resonant states into which the initial state can be decomposed. All ingredients in the equation are computed analytically to first subleading order in the semiclassical limit. Specializing to a coherently-oscillating initial state, we derive an approximation to the time-dependent decay rate and demonstrate its accuracy by comparing it to a numerical solution of the Schrödinger equation.
summary: 我们研究量子力学中亚稳态势阱中一般初始态的衰变。我们根据初始状态可以分解成的谐振状态，提供了隧道穿过势垒的概率电流的闭合形式表达式。方程中的所有成分均按照半经典极限中的第一亚导顺序进行分析计算。针对相干振荡初始状态，我们推导了与时间相关的衰减率的近似值，并通过将其与薛定谔方程的数值解进行比较来证明其准确性。

title: Quantum criticality beyond thermodynamic stability
abstract: For a many-body system in equilibrium, described by a thermodynamically stable Hamiltonian, quantum criticality is associated with structural changes of the many-body ground state. However, there exist physically relevant models, notably, certain quadratic bosonic Hamiltonians (QBHs), which fail to have a ground state. QBHs can be dynamically stable or unstable. We show the notion of criticality is meaningful for the entire class of QBHs that are dynamically stable or at the boundary of instability, regardless of thermodynamic stability, and that the key state for such QBHs is a naturally and unambiguously defined quasiparticle vacuum (QPV). This state is Gaussian, and coincides with the ground state if the QBH is thermodynamically stable. We identify a relevant spectral gap, the Krein gap, associated to the minimal spectral separation between creation and annihilation operators, and show that the QPV is unique when the Krein gap is positive. We prove that, for dynamically stable QBHs with finite-range couplings, correlations are exponentially bounded unless the Krein gap closes, which is associated with one of two spectral degeneracies: an exceptional point or a Krein collision. Consequently, long-range QPV correlations can ensue. Thus, the Krein gap takes the role of the spectral gap for dynamically stable QBHs, and the boundary of dynamical stability and criticality (associated to exceptional points) or multicriticality (associated to Krein collisions) are the same. We also find that bosonic critical behavior beyond thermodynamic stability is witnessed by the scaling of the entanglement entropy and other indicators of equilibrium criticality from information geometry. Our framework opens the door to investigating all dynamically stable QBHs through the lens of critical phenomena, including thermodynamically unstable ones from photonics, cavity-QED, and magnonics.
summary:
对于由热力学稳定哈密顿量描述的平衡多体系统，量子临界性与多体基态的结构变化相关。然而，存在物理相关模型，特别是某些二次玻色哈密顿量（QBH），它们没有基态。 QBH 可以动态稳定或不稳定。我们表明，无论热力学稳定性如何，临界性的概念对于动态稳定或处于不稳定边界的整个 QBH 类都是有意义的，并且此类 QBH 的关键状态是自然且明确定义的准粒子真空（QPV）。该状态是高斯状态，并且如果 QBH 是热力学稳定的，则与基态一致。我们确定了一个相关的谱间隙，即 Kerin 间隙，它与创建算子和湮没算子之间的最小谱间隔相关，并表明当 Kerin 间隙为正时，QPV 是唯一的。我们证明，对于具有有限范围耦合的动态稳定 QBH，除非 Kerin 间隙闭合，否则相关性呈指数有界，这与两种谱简并性之一相关：异常点或 Kerin 碰撞。

因此，可以产生长程 QPV 相关性。因此，Kerin 间隙扮演了动态稳定 QBH 的谱间隙的角色，并且动态稳定性和临界性（与异常点相关）或多临界性（与 Kerin 碰撞相关）的边界是相同的。我们还发现，超出热力学稳定性的玻色子临界行为可以通过纠缠熵的缩放和来自信息几何的平衡临界性的其他指标来证明。我们的框架打开了通过关键现象的视角来研究所有动态稳定的 QBH 的大门，包括来自光子学、腔 QED 和磁振子学的热力学不稳定 QBH。

title: Nonstabilizerness Mpemba Effects
abstract: Quantum state preparation can be strikingly counterintuitive: the fastest route to a target state need not start from the apparently closest initial condition. We uncover such a quantum Mpemba effect in the dynamical generation of quantum magic (nonstabilizerness), quantified by the stabilizer Rényi entropy, in $\mathrm{U(1)}$-symmetric random circuits initialized from tilted product states. States with lower initial magic can generate magic faster than states with higher initial magic. The acceleration is not determined solely by the conserved-charge distribution. Two initial-state families with identical initial magic and identical charge distribution exhibit qualitatively different magic-growth dynamics, depending also on the spatial structure of the initial state within each charge sector. Analogous magic Mpemba effects in $\mathrm{SU(2)}$-symmetric circuits and under nonintegrable Hamiltonian dynamics further show that the phenomenon is tied neither to Abelian symmetry nor to random-circuit dynamics, establishing quantum magic as a distinct arena for Mpemba physics.
summary: 量子态准备可能非常违反直觉：到达目标状态的最快路径不需要从明显最接近的初始条件开始。我们在从倾斜乘积态初始化的 $\mathrm{U(1)}$ 对称随机电路中发现了量子魔法（非稳定性）动态生成中的量子 Mpemba 效应，由稳定器 Rényi 熵进行量化。初始魔力较低的状态比初始魔力较高的状态更快地产生魔力。加速度不仅仅由守恒电荷分布决定。具有相同初始魔力和相同电荷分布的两个初始状态族表现出性质不同的魔力增长动态，这也取决于每个电荷扇区内初始状态的空间结构。 $\mathrm{SU(2)}$对称电路和不可积哈密顿动力学中类似的魔法 Mpemba 效应进一步表明，该现象既与阿贝尔对称性也不与随机电路动力学联系在一起，从而将量子魔法确立为 Mpemba 物理学的独特舞台。

title: Establishing Mixed-State Phase Equivalence beyond Renormalization Fixed Points
abstract: Understanding mixed-state quantum phases is a central challenge in the era of quantum simulation, where many existing studies focus on renormalization fixed points. In this work, we move beyond the renormalization fixed-point paradigm by constructing a quantum phase transition connecting two distinct one-dimensional fixed points, both exhibiting finite conditional mutual information and one of which is intrinsically nontrivial. We analytically establish phase equivalence within each of the two phases by explicitly constructing low-depth, quasi-local channel circuits that connect states within each phase. Crucially, our approach leverages the parent Lindbladian construction to generate the desired channel circuits. We further demonstrate that this framework generalizes naturally to a broad class of intrinsically nontrivial mixed-state quantum phases. Our method establishes a framework for rigorously analyzing phase equivalence of intrinsically non-trivial mixed states beyond the renormalization fixed points.
summary: 理解混合态量子相是量子模拟时代的一个核心挑战，许多现有研究都集中在重整化固定点上。在这项工作中，我们通过构造连接两个不同的一维不动点的量子相变来超越重正化不动点范式，这两个不动点都表现出有限的条件互信息，并且其中一个本质上是不平凡的。我们通过显式构造连接每个阶段内的状态的低深度、准局部通道电路，分析性地在两个阶段中的每个阶段内建立阶段等效性。至关重要的是，我们的方法利用父 Lindbladian 结构来生成所需的通道电路。我们进一步证明，该框架可以自然地推广到一类广泛的本质上非平凡的混合态量子相。我们的方法建立了一个框架，用于严格分析超出重整化不动点的本质上非平凡的混合态的相位等价性。

title: Quantum state texture of dynamical criticality
abstract: We investigate the role of quantum state texture in dynamical quantum phase transitions by establishing a direct connection between critical nonequilibrium dynamics and the recently introduced notion of rugosity, a measure of the quantum state texture. Considering a generic quench protocol, we analyze both standard formulations of the dynamical quantum phase transition. For type-I transitions, defined through the long-time behavior of an order parameter, we show that the time averaged rugosity, evaluated in the eigenbasis of the pre-quench Hamiltonian, acts itself as an order parameter, sharply distinguishing the dynamical phases. In the Lipkin-Meshkov-Glick model, this behavior is traced back to the underlying semiclassical structure, where the crossing of the excited-state quantum phase transition separatrix controls the redistribution of the state over the pre-quench energy basis. For type-II transitions, characterized by nonanalyticities in the Loschmidt rate function, we demonstrate that rugosity acquires a universal interpretation. For a suitable choice of basis, the rate function is exactly given by the density of rugosity, establishing a model-independent equivalence. Moreover, we show that even in physically motivated bases, such as the pre-quench energy eigenbasis, rugosity provides clear signatures of dynamical criticality. Our results place rugosity within a broader class of quantities diagnosing dynamical quantum phase transitions, including complexity and entropy production, while highlighting its distinct role as a measure of a basis-dependent quantum resource. This work provides an information-theoretic perspective on dynamical critical phenomena and opens new directions for exploring quantum texture in nonequilibrium many-body systems.
summary:
我们通过在临界非平衡动力学和最近引入的粗糙度概念（量子态纹理的度量）之间建立直接联系，研究量子态纹理在动态量子相变中的作用。考虑到通用淬灭协议，我们分析了动态量子相变的两种标准公式。对于通过序参数的长期行为定义的 I 型跃迁，我们表明，在淬火前哈密顿量的本征基中评估的时间平均粗糙度本身充当序参数，从而清晰地区分动态相。在 Lipkin-Meshkov-Glick 模型中，这种行为可以追溯到底层的半经典结构，其中激发态量子相变分界线的交叉控制着淬火前能量基础上的状态重新分布。对于以洛施密特速率函数中的非解析性为特征的 II 型跃迁，我们证明了粗糙性获得了普遍的解释。为了选择合适的基，速率函数精确地由粗糙度密度给出，建立了与模型无关的等价性。

此外，我们表明，即使在物理驱动的基础上，例如淬火前的能量本征基础，粗糙度也提供了动态临界性的清晰特征。我们的结果将粗糙度置于诊断动态量子相变的更广泛的数量类别中，包括复杂性和熵产生，同时强调了其作为依赖于基础的量子资源的测量的独特作用。这项工作提供了动态临界现象的信息论视角，并为探索非平衡多体系统中的量子纹理开辟了新方向。

title: A Transferable Machine Learning Approach to Predict Optimized Orbitals for Electronic Structure Problems
abstract: Variational quantum eigensolver ansätze hold considerable promise for ground-state energy calculations on near-term quantum hardware, yet most promising ansatz designs currently strongly depend on how well the molecular orbital basis captures the electronic correlation of the system. Computing optimized orbital coefficients via classical routines is computationally expensive and must be performed independently for each molecular geometry -- a bottleneck that limits scalability across chemical space. We present a graph neural network framework that predicts optimized orbital coefficients directly from molecular geometry and pair-wise bonding structure. Trained on hydrogenic systems of modest size ($H_4$ and $H_6$) across tens of thousands of geometries, our model transfers to larger, unseen systems ($H_8$, $H_{10}$ and $H_{12}$) without retraining -- demonstrating strong out-of-distribution generalization with respect to system size. When evaluating on structured and random configurations, and comparing against energies obtained with full classical optimization, our model reaches mean absolute energy errors $\mathcal{O}(10^2)$ and $\mathcal{O}(10)$ milli-Hartrees, respectively. Beyond energy estimation, the predicted orbitals serve as high-quality warm-start initializations that substantially reduce optimizer iterations to ground-state energy convergence. These results establish graph neural networks as an effective and scalable strategy for accelerating orbital optimization in hybrid quantum-classical workflows, directly reducing the classical pre-processing overhead that currently limits the practical deployment of variational quantum eigensolver on near-term quantum hardware.
summary:
变分量子本征求解器 ansatz 对于近期量子硬件上的基态能量计算具有很大的前景，但目前最有前途的 ansatz 设计在很大程度上取决于分子轨道基础捕获系统电子相关性的程度。通过经典例程计算优化轨道系数的计算成本很高，并且必须针对每个分子几何形状独立执行——这是限制整个化学空间可扩展性的瓶颈。我们提出了一个图神经网络框架，可以直接从分子几何形状和成对键合结构预测优化的轨道系数。我们的模型在数以万计的几何形状的中等尺寸的氢系统（$H_4$ 和 $H_6$）上进行训练，无需重新训练即可转移到更大的、看不见的系统（$H_8$、$H_{10}$ 和 $H_{12}$）——展示了关于系统尺寸的强大的分布外泛化能力。当评估结构化和随机配置，并与完全经典优化获得的能量进行比较时，我们的模型分别达到平均绝对能量误差 $\mathcal{O}(10^2)$ 和 $\mathcal{O}(10)$ milli-Hartrees。

除了能量估计之外，预测轨道还可用作高质量的热启动初始化，从而大大减少基态能量收敛的优化器迭代。这些结果将图神经网络确立为一种有效且可扩展的策略，用于加速混合量子经典工作流程中的轨道优化，直接减少目前限制变分量子本征求解器在近期量子硬件上实际部署的经典预处理开销。

title: GHZ is All You Need: Quantum Sensing with VISTA
abstract: Quantum metrology holds the potential to enhance magnetic field sensing beyond current limits. However, in the presence of realistic noise, this advantage degrades to the Standard Quantum Limit. While recent algorithmic and variational techniques attempt to recover this scaling, they are hindered by stringent control requirements on the probe state that are infeasible in the near term, or by barren plateaus and interpretability issues inherent to black-box variational quantum circuits. Here, we introduce Variational Inference and Sensing with Twin Ansätze (VISTA), a closed-loop protocol that combines passive sensing, or where the probe state is left to evolve without any active control, with physics-informed variational optimization. In the VISTA framework, a probe state evolves under a Lindbladian master-equation, and is compared, via the Swap test, to a parameterized ``quantum twin", a shallow quantum circuit designed to mimic the underlying pure-state or Lindbladian master-equation dynamics. By restricting the optimization space to the physical parameters of interest, VISTA circumvents barren plateaus. We demonstrate that by coupling the protocol with a classical optimizer and high shot counts, VISTA can temporarily achieve near-Heisenberg scaling for moderately noisy qubits over a finite range of system sizes. Furthermore, we introduce a Quasi-Normalization technique that sharpens the loss gradients, enabling simultaneous extraction of both the coherent signal $\theta$ and the environmental noise rate $\gamma$ with low absolute error. Finally, we extend VISTA to the multi-parameter vector metrology regime, enabling simultaneous parameter extraction from a transverse-magnetic-field Hamiltonian. By eliminating the need for complex, open-loop control and processing, VISTA offers a highly practical, resource-efficient framework for near- to intermediate-term quantum sensors.
summary:
量子计量学具有增强磁场传感超越当前限制的潜力。然而，在存在现实噪声的情况下，这种优势会降低到标准量子极限。虽然最近的算法和变分技术试图恢复这种缩放比例，但它们受到短期内不可行的探针状态严格控制要求的阻碍，或者黑盒变分量子电路固有的贫瘠平台和可解释性问题的阻碍。在这里，我们介绍了 Twin Ansätze 的变分推理和传感 (VISTA)，这是一种闭环协议，它结合了被动传感（或者在没有任何主动控制的情况下让探针状态自行演化）与基于物理的变分优化。在 VISTA 框架中，探测态在 Lindbladian 主方程下演化，并通过交换测试与参数化“量子孪生”进行比较，参数化“量子孪生”是一种浅量子电路，旨在模拟底层纯态或 Lindbladian 主方程动力学。通过将优化空间限制在感兴趣的物理参数，VISTA 绕过了贫瘠的平台。

我们证明，通过将协议与经典优化器和高发射次数相结合，VISTA 可以在有限的系统尺寸范围内暂时实现中等噪声量子位的近海森堡缩放。此外，我们引入了一种准归一化技术，可以锐化损耗梯度，从而能够以较低的绝对误差同时提取相干信号 $\theta$ 和环境噪声率 $\gamma$。最后，我们将 VISTA 扩展到多参数矢量计量体系，从而能够从横向磁场哈密顿量中同时提取参数。通过消除对复杂的开环控制和处理的需求，VISTA 为近中期量子传感器提供了高度实用、资源高效的框架。

title: Quantum Compression for Distributed Entanglement
abstract: We study compression strategies for multipartite entanglement distribution under uncertainty in the partitioning of the quantum state. When the partition is not known at the time of state preparation, we show that a joint design of the resource state and a family of compression schemes can increase the entanglement across partitions under a fixed transmission budget. We formulate this as a source coding problem and derive non-asymptotic upper and lower bounds on the achievable average entanglement subject to an average coding rate. We furthermore design an efficient method for jointly optimizing states and lossless compression maps by exploiting the inherent symmetry of weighted Dicke states. In the bipartite case, we propose practical constructions that closely approach the derived upper bound, and more generally we provide practical constructions for multipartite settings.
summary: 我们研究了量子态划分不确定性下多部分纠缠分布的压缩策略。当状态准备时分区未知时，我们表明资源状态和一系列压缩方案的联合设计可以在固定传输预算下增加分区之间的纠缠。我们将其表述为源编码问题，并根据平均编码率导出可实现的平均纠缠的非渐近上限和下限。我们还设计了一种有效的方法，通过利用加权迪克态的固有对称性来联合优化状态和无损压缩图。在二分情况下，我们提出了接近派生上限的实用结构，更一般地，我们为多部分设置提供了实用结构。

title: Energy-error tradeoff in encoding quantum error correction
abstract: While it has been widely recognized that genuine quantum advantage for practical problems might only be achieved with fault-tolerant quantum computers, it is still not entirely clear whether the required quantum error correction will be physically feasible. In the present work, we carefully analyze the required energy resources to encode the logical qubit states for repetition, perfect, and Steane codes. We find that there is a universal trade-off between the target precision and the required energetic resources. Importantly, we find that the energetic resources intimately depend on the specific physical realization of a quantum error correction code, and that the required resources scale exponentially with the targeted precision of the encoding.
summary: 尽管人们普遍认识到，只有通过容错量子计算机才能实现解决实际问题的真正量子优势，但仍不完全清楚所需的量子纠错在物理上是否可行。在目前的工作中，我们仔细分析了对重复码、完美码和 Steane 码的逻辑量子位状态进行编码所需的能源。我们发现目标精度和所需能量资源之间存在普遍的权衡。重要的是，我们发现能量资源密切依赖于量子纠错码的具体物理实现，并且所需的资源随着编码的目标精度呈指数级增长。

title: Hidden Prime-Factor Subgroups in Molecular and Condensed-Phase Systems
abstract: We describe a group theoretic analysis of Shor's algorithm and other related hidden subgroup problems in mathematics and relate these to symmetries of molecular and condensed phase assemblies. By recasting Shor's algorithm through the lens of group theory, we expose the possibility that physical systems such as molecular orbitals, condensed phase assemblies and optical beams may be designed such that these contain information pertaining to the solution to hard mathematical problems such as prime-factoring. We discuss real molecular systems, whose orbitals are constructed from symmetry-adapted linear combinations of atomic orbitals, and show that these contain information pertaining to the prime-factors of corresponding integers. Due to the broad significance of prime-factoring towards a variety of encryption problems in cyber-security, we believe this novel and fundamental approach may have broad impact.
summary: 我们描述了肖尔算法和数学中其他相关隐藏子群问题的群论分析，并将这些与分子和凝聚相组件的对称性联系起来。通过从群论的角度重塑肖尔算法，我们揭示了分子轨道、凝聚相组件和光束等物理系统可以被设计为包含与质因数分解等困难数学问题的解决方案有关的信息的可能性。我们讨论真实的分子系统，其轨道是由原子轨道的对称适应线性组合构成的，并表明它们包含与相应整数的质因数有关的信息。由于质因数分解对于网络安全中的各种加密问题具有广泛的意义，我们相信这种新颖且基本的方法可能会产生广泛的影响。

title: Triage: An Adaptive Parallel Window Decoding Scheduler for Real-time Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computation
abstract: Fault-tolerant quantum computation (FTQC) critically depends on real-time classical decoding, which is rapidly emerging as a system bottleneck. As quantum systems scale, decoding latency and throughput limitations lead to exponential syndrome backlogs and logical operation stalls. While hardware accelerators and parallel windowing offer pathways to speed up decoding, dynamically deploying a finite pool of decoders across a vast quantum error correction architecture remains an unresolved resource allocation problem. To address this, we formulate FTQC decoding as a constrained dynamic scheduling problem by utilizing a spatio-temporal framework based on slices. We propose Triage, a dual-mode architecture that mitigates operation stalls by adaptively combining a cost-efficient heuristic scheduler with a priority-aware emergency mode to rapidly resolve the causal cone of critical operations. Our evaluation shows that Triage maintains low algorithm stalls and logical error rates even under scarce classical resource constraints. Across various benchmarks, Triage achieves an average logical error rate reduction of 52.6% compared to standard temporal parallelism, enabling an efficient classical control plane for scalable FTQC architectures.
summary:
容错量子计算（FTQC）严重依赖于实时经典解码，而这正迅速成为系统瓶颈。随着量子系统的扩展，解码延迟和吞吐量限制会导致指数综合症积压和逻辑操作停顿。虽然硬件加速器和并行窗口提供了加速解码的途径，但在庞大的量子纠错架构中动态部署有限的解码器池仍然是一个未解决的资源分配问题。为了解决这个问题，我们利用基于切片的时空框架将 FTQC 解码制定为约束动态调度问题。我们提出了 Triage，这是一种双模式架构，它通过自适应地将经济高效的启发式调度程序与优先级感知紧急模式相结合来缓解操作停顿，从而快速解决关键操作的因果锥问题。我们的评估表明，即使在稀缺的经典资源限制下，Triage 也能保持较低的算法停顿和逻辑错误率。

在各种基准测试中，与标准时间并行性相比，Triage 的平均逻辑错误率降低了 52.6%，为可扩展 FTQC 架构提供了高效的经典控制平面。

title: Confidence uncertainty: position and momentum can be jointly determined with a guaranteed probability
abstract: Heisenberg's uncertainty principle states that the position and momentum of a particle cannot be sharply determined simultaneously. Standard-deviation and entropic formulations capture the spread of the probability distribution but say little about the probability itself contained in a small region. We introduce the "confidence uncertainty" $\Delta^{c}x(\theta_x)$ as the minimal Lebesgue measure of the support set in which the particle is found with probability at least $\theta_x$, and the companion "interval confidence uncertainty" $\Delta^{I}x(\theta_x)$ which restricts the support to a single interval. We prove two complementary uncertainty inequalities. (i) For $\theta_x+\theta_p\le 1$ both confidence uncertainties can be made arbitrarily small simultaneously, so that no nontrivial product bound holds; in particular, position and momentum can be jointly localised with probability at least~$50\%$. (ii) For $\theta_x+\theta_p>1$ a lower bound holds: combining Lenard's projection inequality with the Donoho--Stark operator-norm bound we obtain $\Delta^{c}x\,\Delta^{c}p\geq 2\pi\hbar\bigl(\sqrt{\theta_x\theta_p}-\sqrt{(1-\theta_x)(1-\theta_p)}\bigr)^{\!2}$, and for the interval version we obtain the sharp implicit Landau--Pollak bound $\Delta^{I}x\,\Delta^{I}p\geq 4\hbar\,\lambda_{0}^{-1}\!\bigl((\sqrt{\theta_x\theta_p}-\sqrt{(1-\theta_x)(1-\theta_p)})^{2}\bigr)$, where $\lambda_{0}(c)$ is the largest prolate-spheroidal eigenvalue. We support the analytical bounds with numerical evaluation of $\lambda_{0}(c)$, provide closed-form small-$c$ and large-$c$ asymptotics, compute the optimal Slepian-superposition states that saturate the interval bound, and compare the resulting product against the variance Heisenberg--Kennard, the Białynicki-Birula--Mycielski entropic, and the Donoho--Stark concentration bounds.
summary:
海森堡测不准原理指出，粒子的位置和动量不能同时被精确确定。标准差和熵公式捕捉了概率分布的分布，但很少涉及小区域中包含的概率本身。我们引入“置信不确定性”$\Delta^{c}x(\theta_x)$作为支持集的最小勒贝格测度，其中粒子被发现的概率至少为$\theta_x$，以及伴随的“区间置信不确定性”$\Delta^{I}x(\theta_x)$将支持限制在单个区间。我们证明了两个互补的不确定性不等式。 (i) 对于$\theta_x+\theta_p\le 1$，两个置信不确定性可以同时任意小，因此不存在非平凡乘积界；特别是，位置和动量可以以至少 ~$50\%$ 的概率联合定位。

(ii) 对于 $\theta_x+\theta_p>1$，下界成立：将 Lenard 投影不等式与 Donoho-Stark 算子范数界相结合，我们得到 $\Delta^{c}x\,\Delta^{c}p\geq 2\pi\hbar\bigl(\sqrt{\theta_x\theta_p}-\sqrt{(1-\theta_x)(1-\theta_p)}\bigr)^{\!2}$，对于区间版本，我们获得尖锐的隐式 Landau--Pollak 边界 $\Delta^{I}x\,\Delta^{I}p\geq 4\hbar\,\lambda_{0}^{-1}\!\bigl((\sqrt{\theta_x\theta_p}-\sqrt{(1-\theta_x)(1-\theta_p)})^{2}\bigr)$，其中$\lambda_{0}(c)$是最大长椭球特征值。我们通过 $\lambda_{0}(c)$ 的数值评估来支持分析界限，提供封闭形式的small-$c$ 和large-$c$ 渐近，计算使区间界限饱和的最佳Slepian 叠加态，并将所得乘积与方差 Heisenberg--Kennard、Białynicki-Birula-Mycielski 熵和 Donoho-Stark 浓度界限进行比较。

title: Hierarchical entanglement transitions and hidden area-law sectors in quantum many-body dynamics
abstract: Chaotic many-body dynamics typically generates volume-law entanglement from initially low-entangled states. We reveal an intricate, hierarchical entanglement structure in local quantum quenches, both in the canonical purification of locally quenched Gibbs states and in a companion pure-state circuit model. In either setting, the full state exhibits a Renyi-index-tuned transition: at long times, $S_{\alpha>1}$ obeys an area law, while $S_{\alpha\le 1}$ is volume-law. More strikingly, the response linear in the quench strength is carried by only an O(1)-dimensional dominant Schmidt sector; the corresponding states exhibit their own area-to-volume-law transitions at critical indices $\alpha_c<1$, implying polynomial-bond-dimension approximability in one dimension. We provide evidence that this hierarchy persists recursively: upon bipartitioning the dominant Schmidt states, their leading Schmidt sectors exhibit analogous structure. We derive the mechanism analytically in the circuit model, prove the $S_{\alpha>1}$ area law for locally quenched Gibbs states, and support the hierarchy by exact diagonalization of random circuits and locally quenched Gibbs states of chaotic spin chains.
summary: 混沌多体动力学通常从最初的低纠缠态产生体积律纠缠。我们揭示了局部量子淬灭中复杂的分层纠缠结构，无论是在局部淬灭吉布斯态的规范纯化中还是在配套的纯态电路模型中。在任一设置中，完整状态都表现出 Renyi 指数调整的转变：在很长一段时间内，$S_{\alpha>1}$ 遵循面积定律，而 $S_{\alpha\le 1}$ 遵循体积定律。更引人注目的是，淬火强度的响应线性仅由 O(1) 维主导施密特扇区承载；相应的状态在临界指数 $\alpha_c<1$ 处表现出自己的面积到体积定律的转变，这意味着一维的多项式键维数近似。我们提供的证据表明，这种层次结构递归地持续存在：在对占主导地位的施密特状态进行二分时，它们的主导施密特扇区表现出类似的结构。我们在电路模型中分析推导了该机制，证明了局部淬灭吉布斯态的 $S_{\alpha>1}$ 面积定律，并通过随机电路的精确对角化和混沌自旋链的局部淬灭吉布斯态来支持层次结构。

title: Fundamental Limitations of Post-Quantum Cryptographic Architectures
abstract: Modern lattice-based cryptography, particularly the learning with errors paradigm, relies on injecting artificial noise to secure data against quantum adversaries. This study systematically examines the theoretical and physical boundaries of this noise-reliant model across four interconnected domains: computational complexity, information-theoretic thermodynamics, quantum error correction, and quantum learning theory. Starting from the algorithmic foundation, our analysis notes that these frameworks rely on provisional complexity-theoretic assumptions that remain vulnerable to future quantum algorithmic advancements. Furthermore, by translating this cryptographic mechanism into physical thermodynamics, we illustrate that intentionally injected discrete Gaussian noise does not equate to the permanent erasure of information. Because the structural integrity of the cryptographic secret remains preserved within the ciphertext, advanced quantum error correction protocols and quantum learning models can efficiently extract the underlying mathematical kernel. Ultimately, we suggest that while lattice-based cryptography provides a robust transitional alternative, definitively classifying these frameworks as unconditionally post-quantum represents a premature classification relying on transient physical bottlenecks rather than impenetrable theoretical boundaries.
summary:
现代基于格的密码学，特别是错误学习范式，依赖于注入人工噪声来保护数据免受量子对手的攻击。这项研究系统地研究了这种依赖噪声的模型在四个相互关联的领域的理论和物理边界：计算复杂性、信息论热力学、量子纠错和量子学习理论。从算法基础开始，我们的分析指出，这些框架依赖于临时复杂性理论假设，这些假设仍然容易受到未来量子算法进步的影响。此外，通过将这种加密机制转化为物理热力学，我们证明故意注入离散高斯噪声并不等于信息的永久删除。由于密码秘密的结构完整性保留在密文中，因此先进的量子纠错协议和量子学习模型可以有效地提取底层数学内核。

最终，我们认为，虽然基于格的密码学提供了一种强大的过渡替代方案，但将这些框架明确地分类为无条件后量子代表了一种依赖于瞬态物理瓶颈而不是不可逾越的理论边界的过早分类。

title: Single-photon scattering by a giant molecule asymmetrically coupled to parallel waveguides
abstract: We investigate single-photon scattering in a waveguide-QED setup, where a giant molecule composed of two frequency-detuned giant atoms is coupled to two parallel waveguides via multiple connection points. The competition between coherent atom--atom coupling and the effective decay rates dictates the splitting of a single resonance into a doublet in the transmission (reflection) spectra. By tailoring the asymmetry of the decay rates and the atomic detuning, one can engineer photon-path interference to optimize the transfer between waveguides; under chiral coupling conditions, this interference can be further harnessed to realize fully deterministic routing. In the non-Markovian regime, retardation effects can reshape the spectra and actively drive transitions between the weak- and strong-coupling regimes, converting an unsplit Markovian resonance into a clearly separated doublet, or conversely merging a split doublet back into a single resonance. For sufficiently long time delays, it further generates multiple resonances and avoided crossings, enriching the spectral response. Our results demonstrate how atomic detuning, decay-rate asymmetry, and non-Markovian retardation cooperate to provide versatile, interference-based control over single-photon routing in multi-port quantum networks.
summary:
我们研究了波导 QED 设置中的单光子散射，其中由两个频率失谐的巨型原子组成的巨型分子通过多个连接点耦合到两个平行的波导。相干原子-原子耦合和有效衰减率之间的竞争决定了单个共振分裂成透射（反射）光谱中的双峰。通过调整衰减率和原子失谐的不对称性，人们可以设计光子路径干涉来优化波导之间的传输；在手性耦合条件下，可以进一步利用这种干扰来实现完全确定性的路由。在非马尔可夫体系中，延迟效应可以重塑光谱并主动驱动弱耦合体系和强耦合体系之间的转变，将未分裂的马尔可夫共振转换为清晰分离的双峰，或者相反地将分裂双峰合并回单个共振。对于足够长的时间延迟，它进一步产生多重共振并避免交叉，丰富光谱响应。

我们的结果证明了原子失谐、衰变率不对称和非马尔可夫延迟如何协同作用，为多端口量子网络中的单光子路由提供多功能、基于干扰的控制。

title: Two-site Bose-Hubbard hopping and Schrödinger cat states
abstract: The Bose-Hubbard Hamiltonian can be simplified to have only two lattice sites, in which case the system being described is referred to as a dimer. Due to its structure, the hopping term of the dimer Hamiltonian enjoys invariance in a family of subspaces indexed by a whole number $k$, each subspace corresponding to a system of only $k$ particles. We have invented an inductive argument using the bosonic canonical commutation relations to find the eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the dimer hopping Hamiltonian in its $k$-particle subspaces. In particular, this Hamiltonian, when restricted to one of the $k$-particle subspaces, is exactly the spin projection operator along the $x$-axis, where the number of particles $k$ in the dimer system yields the projection matrix for spin quantum number $s=k/2$. Thus, a new method for computing the eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the $x$-axis spin projector has been unearthed. We use the explicit construction to study the dynamics of coherent states induced by the square of the dimer hopping hamiltonian. We find that it generates Schrödinger cat states in the two-site setting.
summary: 玻色-哈伯德哈密顿量可以简化为仅具有两个晶格位点，在这种情况下所描述的系统被称为二聚体。由于其结构，二聚体哈密顿量的跳跃项在由整数 $k$ 索引的子空间族中具有不变性，每个子空间对应于仅包含 $k$ 粒子的系统。我们发明了一种归纳论证，使用玻色正则交换关系来查找二聚体跳跃哈密顿量在其 $k$ 粒子子空间中的特征值和特征向量。特别是，当限制为 $k$ 粒子子空间之一时，该哈密顿量恰好是沿 $x$ 轴的自旋投影算子，其中二聚体系统中的粒子数 $k$ 产生自旋量子数 $s=k/2$ 的投影矩阵。因此，一种计算$x$轴自旋投影仪的特征值和特征向量的新方法已经被发现。我们使用显式结构来研究由二聚体跳跃哈密尔顿平方引起的相干态动力学。我们发现它在两站点设置中产生薛定谔猫状态。

title: Neural network modeling of many-body super- and sub-radiant dynamics
abstract: There is significant interest in exploring novel phenomena in quantum light-matter interfaces, which are driven by the combination of structured dissipation and long-range interactions that are typical in such systems. To this end, it is important to develop new general numerical simulation techniques, which can access large system sizes and are not based on semi-classical approaches. Here, we report the first application of neural quantum states to obtain the dissipative dynamics of light-matter-coupled systems beyond what is accessible with exact and tensor-network calculations. We specifically apply this method to simulate the many-body emission dynamics of approximately 40 atoms, arranged in dense arrays in one and two dimensions. These systems have been chosen because they can support prominent subradiant dynamics at late times and could be realized with cold atomic quantum simulators.
summary: 人们对探索量子光-物质界面中的新现象非常感兴趣，这些现象是由此类系统中典型的结构耗散和长程相互作用的组合驱动的。为此，开发新的通用数值模拟技术非常重要，该技术可以访问大型系统并且不基于半经典方法。在这里，我们报告了神经量子态的首次应用，以获得光物质耦合系统的耗散动力学，超出了精确和张量网络计算所能达到的范围。我们专门应用这种方法来模拟大约 40 个原子的多体发射动力学，这些原子在一维和二维上排列成密集阵列。选择这些系统是因为它们可以支持后期显着的次辐射动力学，并且可以通过冷原子量子模拟器来实现。

title: Efficient Multi-Controlled Gate Implementation in Trapped-Ion Systems
abstract: Multi-controlled gates are essential primitives in quantum algorithms, yet implementing them via standard gate-level decompositions remains resource-intensive. We develop efficient pulse-level implementations of multi-controlled gates in trapped-ion systems using the Cirac-Zoller scheme. We first show that the Cirac-Zoller construction admits a freedom in the sign choice of red-sideband (RSB) pulses, which leaves the logical operation invariant up to a local Pauli-$Z$ correction. By exploiting this freedom, we construct equivalent realizations of multi-controlled gates and develop pulse cancellation for more efficient implementations of successive gates. We perform numerical simulations and show that pulse cancellation reduces the gate time and improves the state fidelity. Furthermore, we propose ancilla-free circuits for general $N$-controlled gates that use a single-controlled gate primitive and $\mathcal{O}(N)$ RSB pulses. As a key application, we apply our pulse cancellation to the linear combination of unitaries (LCU) method for block encoding. We show that the RSB-pulse cost of the select operator over $L$ unitaries can be reduced from $\mathcal{O}(L\log L)$ to $\mathcal{O}(L)$, which improves the efficiency and scalability of LCU-based quantum circuits.
summary:
多控制门是量子算法中的基本原语，但通过标准门级分解实现它们仍然需要大量资源。我们使用 Cirac-Zoller 方案开发了捕获离子系统中多控制门的高效脉冲级实现。我们首先证明 Cirac-Zoller 结构允许自由选择红边带 (RSB) 脉冲的符号，这使得逻辑运算在局部 Pauli-$Z$ 校正之前保持不变。通过利用这种自由度，我们构建了多控制门的等效实现，并开发了脉冲消除，以更有效地实现连续门。我们进行数值模拟并表明脉冲消除减少了选通时间并提高了状态保真度。此外，我们为一般的$N$控制门提出了无辅助电路，该电路使用单控制门原语和$\mathcal{O}(N)$ RSB脉冲。作为一个关键应用，我们将脉冲消除应用于块编码的酉线性组合 (LCU) 方法。

我们证明，$L$酉上的选择算子的 RSB 脉冲成本可以从 $\mathcal{O}(L\log L)$ 降低到 $\mathcal{O}(L)$，这提高了基于 LCU 的量子电路的效率和可扩展性。

title: Automated Circuit Depth Reduction of Quantum Subroutines via Compilation
abstract: Optimizing quantum circuits by reducing circuit depth is essential for improving the efficiency and scalability of quantum algorithms, particularly as quantum hardware continues to evolve. This can be achieved by restructuring quantum algorithms to allow more parallelism. A compiler is needed to automatically detect and apply these optimizations. In this work, we focus on the optimization of two fundamental quantum subroutines: GHZ state creation and CNOT/CZ chain decomposition. Traditional implementations of these subroutines suffer from linearly increasing circuit depth, which limits scalability. We propose a compiler-driven approach that automatically detects and optimizes these two fundamental quantum subroutines. Our approach reduces circuit depth through constant-depth GHZ state creation, constant depth CZ chain decomposition, and logarithmic depth recursive CNOT chain decomposition, which enhance parallel execution. Performance analysis of benchmarked algorithms shows significant reductions in depth. However, our solution also results in an increased gate count, which makes our optimization a trade-off. The gate count for the CNOT chains is doubled, where logarithmic depth reduction is achieved. The reduced circuit depth results in more efficient algorithms by reducing execution time.
summary:
通过减少电路深度来优化量子电路对于提高量子算法的效率和可扩展性至关重要，特别是随着量子硬件的不断发展。这可以通过重构量子算法以允许更多并行性来实现。需要编译器来自动检测和应用这些优化。在这项工作中，我们重点关注两个基本量子子程序的优化：GHZ 状态创建和 CNOT/CZ 链分解。这些子例程的传统实现面临着线性增加的电路深度的问题，这限制了可扩展性。我们提出了一种编译器驱动的方法，可以自动检测和优化这两个基本的量子子例程。我们的方法通过恒定深度 GHZ 状态创建、恒定深度 CZ 链分解和对数深度递归 CNOT 链分解来减少电路深度，从而增强并行执行。基准算法的性能分析显示深度显着减少。然而，我们的解决方案也会导致门数增加，这使得我们的优化成为一种权衡。

CNOT 链的门数加倍，实现了对数深度减少。减少的电路深度可以减少执行时间，从而提高算法的效率。

title: Quantum Magic in early FTQC: From Diagonal Clifford Hierarchy No-Go Theorems to Architecture Design Blueprints
abstract: We address the circuit-design problem of maximizing quantum magic in early fault-tolerant quantum computing (early FTQC), where logical dynamics natively take the form of alternating Clifford layers and diagonal non-Clifford layers. To render this optimization analytically tractable, we first prove a uniqueness theorem: for operational magic functionals built from Pauli expectation values, the axioms of faithfulness and tensor-product additivity force a Rényi-type dependence on the Pauli-spectrum. Leveraging the closed phase-polynomial description of the diagonal Clifford hierarchy, we derive exact Pauli-spectrum expressions and tight bounds for a shallow-layer model. These bounds expose a zero-magic mechanism and prove that maximal magic strictly requires graph-state preconditioning. Consequently, we establish our first no-go theorem: hierarchy level alone cannot universally order operational magic. Extending our framework to the $N$-layer model motivated by the Space-Time Efficient Analog Rotation (STAR) architecture, we obtain an exact iterative update rule for the Pauli spectrum. This yields a second no-go theorem: no state-independent sequence of operations can guarantee monotonic magic improvement. Together, these theorems demonstrate that algebraic gate structures are fundamentally insufficient to dictate resource generation. To overcome this, we reframe early FTQC gate selection as a state-aware, differentiable optimization over continuous analog parameters. Finally, we identify a severe kinematic expressibility bottleneck in architectures restricted to single-qubit $Z$-rotations and show that introducing nonlinear diagonal phases, such as multi-qubit $Z$-rotation, shatters this bottleneck. This provides a fundamental principle for demonstrating early FTQC, establishing scalable magic generation as a foundational benchmark for evaluating early FTQC architectures.
summary:
我们解决了在早期容错量子计算（早期 FTQC）中最大化量子魔法的电路设计问题，其中逻辑动力学本身采用交替 Clifford 层和对角线非 Clifford 层的形式。为了使这种优化在分析上易于处理，我们首先证明一个唯一性定理：对于从泡利期望值构建的运算魔函数，忠实公理和张量积可加性迫使对泡利谱的 Rényi 型依赖。利用对角 Clifford 层次结构的闭相多项式描述，我们推导出浅层模型的精确泡利谱表达式和紧界。这些界限暴露了零魔法机制，并证明最大魔法严格需要图状态预处理。因此，我们建立了第一个不可行定理：仅凭层次结构级别无法普遍订购操作魔法。将我们的框架扩展到由时空高效模拟旋转（STAR）架构驱动的 $N$ 层模型，我们获得了泡利谱的精确迭代更新规则。

这产生了第二个不可行定理：没有状态独立的操作序列可以保证单调的魔法改进。这些定理共同证明代数门结构从根本上不足以决定资源生成。为了克服这个问题，我们将早期 FTQC 门选择重新定义为对连续模拟参数的状态感知、可微分优化。最后，我们在仅限于单量子位 $Z$ 旋转的架构中发现了严重的运动学可表达性瓶颈，并表明引入非线性对角相位（例如多量子位 $Z$ 旋转）可以打破这一瓶颈。这为展示早期 FTQC 提供了基本原则，建立可扩展的魔法生成作为评估早期 FTQC 架构的基础基准。

title: Scheduling Entanglement Flows in Multi-channel Quantum Networks
abstract: This paper addresses resource allocation for entanglement distribution in multi-channel quantum networks. A system model is proposed that integrates a multi-channel quantum network architecture with heterogeneous link characteristics and user-centric entanglement request handling, including queuing and retry mechanisms. Classical allocation methods for assigning channels and quantum processors to generate entanglement between end nodes are implemented, including the Dynamic Efficient algorithm, Static Efficient algorithm, and the Success Enhancement algorithm. In addition, a Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)-based allocation approach driven by a reward function is proposed. These methods are evaluated through multi-slot simulations using metrics such as request delay, total number of successful entanglement requests, network capacity utilization, and the entanglement request handling rate. The results show that Dynamic Efficient achieves the lowest delay, while Success Enhancement improves the number of successful requests through multipath allocation. The PPO-based method provides the best overall balance by improving capacity utilization and achieving both low delay and a high number of successful entanglement requests.
summary:
本文讨论了多通道量子网络中纠缠分布的资源分配。提出了一种系统模型，集成了具有异构链路特性的多通道量子网络架构和以用户为中心的纠缠请求处理，包括排队和重试机制。实现了分配通道和量子处理器以在端节点之间产生纠缠的经典分配方法，包括动态高效算法、静态高效算法和成功增强算法。此外，还提出了一种由奖励函数驱动的基于近端策略优化（PPO）的分配方法。这些方法通过多时隙模拟使用请求延迟、成功纠缠请求总数、网络容量利用率和纠缠请求处理率等指标进行评估。结果表明，Dynamic Efficient 实现了最低延迟，而 Success Enhancement 通过多路径分配提高了成功请求的数量。

基于PPO的方法通过提高容量利用率并实现低延迟和大量成功的纠缠请求来提供最佳的整体平衡。

title: Quantum algorithm for solving differential equations using SLAC derivatives
abstract: We present the construction of efficient linear-combination-of-unitaries (LCU)-based block-encodings for the first-order derivative and Laplacian operators in the SLAC representation. We use state-preparation techniques designed for smoothly decaying functions to efficiently prepare the dense LCU amplitudes with high success probability and low gate cost. Furthermore, we demonstrate how Shannon wavelet transforms can be applied to these block-encodings to efficiently obtain multi-scale representations of the SLAC derivative operators. We then show how to apply a diagonal preconditioner that reduces the condition number of these matrices in the multi-scale wavelet basis to a small constant. This approach enables the solution of partial differential equations with SLAC-discretised derivative operators on a finite lattice using the quantum linear solving algorithm (QLSA). Throughout this work, we analyse the computational complexity and error scaling of each implementation.
summary: 我们为 SLAC 表示中的一阶导数和拉普拉斯算子提出了基于酉线性组合 (LCU) 的高效块编码的构造。我们使用专为平滑衰减函数而设计的状态准备技术，以高成功概率和低门成本有效地准备密集的 LCU 幅度。此外，我们还演示了如何将香农小波变换应用于这些块编码，以有效地获得 SLAC 导数算子的多尺度表示。然后，我们展示如何应用对角预处理器，将多尺度小波基中这些矩阵的条件数减少到一个小常数。该方法能够使用量子线性求解算法 (QLSA) 在有限格上通过 SLAC 离散导数算子求解偏微分方程。在整个工作中，我们分析了每个实现的计算复杂性和误差缩放。

title: Catalytic advantage in asymptotic entanglement manipulation
abstract: Entanglement is a key quantum resource in various quantum protocols, with a rich set of laws governing its manipulation. In this context, catalysis refers to the possibility of an auxiliary state that enables a previously forbidden manipulation, while being completely returned at the end. While the catalytic setting has been thoroughly examined in the single-copy regime, much less is known in the asymptotically many copy regime. In this work, we focus on the entanglement cost of preparing asymptotically many copies of a given state exactly. We show that catalysis can significantly lower the exact entanglement cost by constructing an explicit catalytic protocol. Additionally, these findings generalize readily to other resource theories, showing a general catalytic advantage in the resource dilution task.
summary: 纠缠是各种量子协议中的关键量子资源，具有丰富的控制其操纵的​​定律。在这种情况下，催化是指辅助状态的可能性，该状态能够实现先前禁止的操作，同时在最后完全返回。虽然催化设置已经在单拷贝机制中得到了彻底的研究，但在渐近多拷贝机制中我们知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们重点关注精确准备给定状态的渐近许多副本的纠缠成本。我们表明，通过构建明确的催化方案，催化可以显着降低确切的纠缠成本。此外，这些发现很容易推广到其他资源理论，显示出在资源稀释任务中的普遍催化优势。

title: Quantum Realizability of Probabilistic Theories Stable under Teleportation
abstract: The classification of general probabilistic theories (GPTs) whose CHSH value is stable under arbitrary rounds of teleportation and entanglement swapping was recently obtained in Dmello and Gross work and consists of seven families, indexed by characters of the Klein four-group $K_4$, the cyclic group $\mathbb{Z}_4$, and the dihedral group $D_4$. The question of which of these families admits a realization within standard quantum mechanics was left open. In this work we resolve this question completely. Using elementary representation theory, we prove that exactly two families are quantum-realizable, namely $\chi^{K_4}_{1234}$ and $\chi^{D_4}_{125}$, while the remaining five admit no quantum realization.
summary: 最近在 Dmello 和 Gross 的工作中获得了 CHSH 值在任意轮隐形传态和纠缠交换下稳定的一般概率理论 (GPT) 的分类，该分类由七个族组成，由克莱因四群 $K_4$、循环群 $\mathbb{Z}_4$ 和二面体群 $D_4$ 的特征索引。这些家族中的哪一个承认在标准量子力学中实现的问题仍然悬而未决。在这项工作中，我们彻底解决了这个问题。使用基本表示论，我们证明了恰好有两个族是量子可实现的，即 $\chi^{K_4}_{1234}$ 和 $\chi^{D_4}_{125}$，而其余五个族则不允许量子实现。

title: Beyond Gates: Pulse Level Quantum Fourier Models
abstract: In the domain of variational quantum algorithms, quantum Fourier models (QFMs) provide a mathematically well defined structure for quantum machine learning (QML). There has been a substantial amount of work on the scalability and trainability of such models showcasing the potential but also the limitations for the prospective application of QFMs. However, much less is known in the context of pulse-level quantum computing, where the microwave parameters that implement unitary operations on the hardware are used to perform computations directly instead of through the interface of quantum circuits. In this work, we evaluate QFMs through the lens of pulse parameters and link metrics such as expressibility and Fourier coefficient correlation (FCC) to this extended set of variational parameters. We show that while control over pulse shapes does not significantly alter the global expressibility or structural correlations of the Ansatz, it fundamentally alters the local optimisation landscape. For composite gates, independent pulse scalings replace a single logical angle by multiple independently tunable sub-angles. This relaxes the rigid monomial couplings induced by the gate-level parameterisation, and provides gradient descent with higher-dimensional escape routes, decoupling local parameter constraints and significantly boosting performance during training. Following an analytical proof, we show numerical results validating our theory on training a QFM with an exponential (ternary) feature map on a Fourier series with the same frequencies.
summary:
在变分量子算法领域，量子傅立叶模型 (QFM) 为量子机器学习 (QML) 提供了数学上明确定义的结构。在此类模型的可扩展性和可训练性方面已经开展了大量工作，展示了 QFM 未来应用的潜力，但也存在局限性。然而，人们对脉冲级量子计算的了解却少之又少，在脉冲级量子计算中，在硬件上实现酉运算的微波参数被用来直接执行计算，而不是通过量子电路的接口。在这项工作中，我们通过脉冲参数和链接指标（例如可表达性和傅里叶系数相关性 (FCC)）与这组扩展的变分参数来评估 QFM。我们表明，虽然对脉冲形状的控制不会显着改变 Ansatz 的全局可表达性或结构相关性，但它从根本上改变了局部优化景观。对于复合门，独立的脉冲缩放由多个独立可调的子角度代替单个逻辑角度。

这放松了由门级参数化引起的刚性单项式耦合，并提供具有更高维逃逸路线的梯度下降，解耦局部参数约束并显着提高训练期间的性能。经过分析证明后，我们展示了数值结果，验证了我们在具有相同频率的傅里叶级数上使用指数（三元）特征图训练 QFM 的理论。

title: Exact SU(2) Yang-Mills Waves from a Simple Ansatz
abstract: We propose a simple ansatz to construct exact wave solutions of the sourceless SU(2) Yang-Mills equations in (3+1) dimensions. The ansatz employs a $y$-dependent rotated Pauli basis and assumes a phase $\theta=kz-\omega t$ dependence for the gauge potentials. Owing to this ansatz, the nonlinear field equations reduce to nine algebraic constraints, whose complete solution yields three families of exact waves. Family I describes linear (Abelian) electromagnetic waves embedded in the non-Abelian theory; all commutator terms vanish and the dispersion relation is $\omega=kc$. Family II represents genuinely nonlinear self-interacting waves that also propagate at the speed of light but exhibit a constant field offset, nonvanishing commutators, and do not obey superposition. The constant offset is gauge-invariant and gives rise to a non-zero time-averaged color-electric field. The energy density has nodes whose position ($\theta=0$ or $\theta=\pi$) is controlled by a discrete topological parameter $\xi\eta=\pm1$, providing an observable signature. Family III is a pure gauge solution with vanishing field strengths, valid for arbitrary $k$ and $\omega$ without any dispersion relation. All solutions are closed-form and provide new insights into how non-Abelian self-interactions fundamentally alter wave propagation.
summary:
我们提出了一个简单的 ansatz 来构造 (3+1) 维中无源 SU(2) Yang-Mills 方程的精确波解。 ansatz 采用依赖于 $y$ 的旋转泡利基，并假设规范势具有相位 $\theta=kz-\omega t$ 依赖关系。由于这个 ansatz，非线性场方程减少到九个代数约束，其完整的解产生三个精确波族。第一族描述了嵌入非阿贝尔理论的线性（阿贝尔）电磁波；所有换向项消失，色散关系为$\omega=kc$。第二族代表真正的非线性自相互作用波，它们也以光速传播，但表现出恒定的场偏移、非零换向器，并且不服从叠加。恒定偏移量是规范不变的，并产生非零时间平均彩色电场。能量密度的节点的位置（$\theta=0$ 或 $\theta=\pi$）由离散拓扑参数 $\xi\eta=\pm1$ 控制，提供可观察的签名。系列 III 是场强消失的纯规范解，对于任意 $k$ 和 $\omega$ 有效，没有任何色散关系。

所有解决方案都是封闭形式的，并为非阿贝尔自相互作用如何从根本上改变波传播提供了新的见解。

title: Dephasing Effects on the Dynamical Evolution of Quantum Correlations and Coherence in Neutrino Oscillations
abstract: Neutrino oscillations confirm the presence of mode entanglement, as each flavor eigenstate is composed of a coherent superposition of distinct mass eigenstates. In this work, we investigate the dynamics of quantum resources in neutrino oscillation systems by analyzing quantum steering, logarithmic negativity, and quantum coherence within a two-flavor framework. Treating neutrino oscillations as an effective two-level quantum system, we study the influence of environmental decoherence on these nonclassical features by modeling the system as an open quantum system. Three representative noise channels are considered, namely amplitude damping (AD), phase flip (PF), and phase damping (PD), allowing us to capture both dissipative and dephasing mechanisms. We examine the evolution of quantum resources in both Markovian and non-Markovian regimes, highlighting the role of memory effects in the system-environment interaction. The results reveal a clear hierarchy in the robustness of quantum resources under decoherence. Steering is the most sensitive correlation in the hierarchy under decoherence effects. while logarithmic negativity exhibits intermediate robustness. Quantum coherence displays the highest resilience, persisting over a wider range of parameters. In the PF and PD channels, logarithmic negativity and coherence are shown to exhibit identical dynamical behavior, reflecting their common dependence on phase-related noise. In contrast, the non-Markovian regime leads to delayed decoherence and partial revivals of entanglement and coherence due to information backflow, whereas quantum steering remains strongly suppressed. These findings provide a comparison of different quantum resources in neutrino oscillation systems and offer new insights into the interplay between decoherence mechanisms and quantum correlations.
summary:
中微子振荡证实了模式纠缠的存在，因为每种风味本征态都是由不同质量本征态的相干叠加组成的。在这项工作中，我们通过分析两种框架内的量子转向、对数负性和量子相干性来研究中微子振荡系统中量子资源的动力学。将中微子振荡视为有效的两级量子系统，我们通过将系统建模为开放量子系统来研究环境退相干对这些非经典特征的影响。考虑了三个有代表性的噪声通道，即幅度阻尼 (AD)、相位翻转 (PF) 和相位阻尼 (PD)，使我们能够捕获耗散和相移机制。我们研究了马尔可夫和非马尔可夫体系中量子资源的演化，强调了记忆效应在系统-环境相互作用中的作用。结果揭示了退相干下量子资源鲁棒性的清晰层次。在退相干效应下，转向是层次结构中最敏感的相关性。而对数负性表现出中等的鲁棒性。

量子相干性表现出最高的弹性，在更广泛的参数范围内持续存在。在 PF 和 PD 通道中，对数负性和相干性表现出相同的动态行为，反映了它们对相位相关噪声的共同依赖性。相比之下，非马尔可夫体系由于信息回流而导致延迟退相干以及纠缠和相干性的部分恢复，而量子转向仍然受到强烈抑制。这些发现提供了中微子振荡系统中不同量子资源的比较，并为退相干机制和量子相关性之间的相互作用提供了新的见解。

title: Dimeric Perylene-Bisimide Organic Molecules: Fractional-Time Control of Quantum Resources
abstract: In this work, we explore the dynamics of quantum correlations, namely coherence, entanglement, and nonlocality associated with a Bell state, in a dimeric arrangement of organic PBI molecules, mediated by dipole-dipole interactions, under time-fractional dynamics. Within the framework of the time-fractional Schrödinger equation (TFSE) with Caputo fractional derivatives, we explore system dynamics for different values of the fractional order $\tau$, transition energies, interaction strength, and purity $p$. We employ the relative entropy of coherence, logarithmic entanglement entropy and concurrence, and CHSH inequality to estimate system dynamics associated with coherence, entanglement, and nonlocality, respectively. These findings highlight the role of the fractional order $\tau$ in system dynamics, including memory effects and relaxation, and thereby bring together ideas from fractional calculus and quantum information theory perspectives and discuss methodologies to control and utilize these molecular quantum correlations.
summary: 在这项工作中，我们在时间分数动力学下探索了有机 PBI 分子二聚体排列中量子相关性的动力学，即与贝尔态相关的相干性、纠缠性和非局域性，由偶极子-偶极子相互作用介导。在带有 Caputo 分数阶导数的时间分数阶薛定谔方程 (TFSE) 的框架内，我们探索分数阶 $\tau$、跃迁能量、相互作用强度和纯度 $p$ 的不同值的系统动力学。我们利用相干性的相对熵、对数纠缠熵和并发性以及 CHSH 不等式来分别估计与相干性、纠缠性和非定域性相关的系统动力学。这些发现强调了分数阶$\tau$在系统动力学中的作用，包括记忆效应和弛豫，从而汇集了分数阶微积分和量子信息论角度的想法，并讨论了控制和利用这些分子量子相关性的方法。

title: A Factor-Graph Formulation of CSS Syndrome Decoding: Joint BP and Four-State BP
abstract: For CSS syndrome decoding, the two check matrices impose binary parity-check constraints on the two Pauli error components. The posterior can therefore be written as a binary factor graph with two Tanner graphs coupled by the local joint prior at each qubit. We call the sum-product algorithm on this factorization joint belief propagation (joint BP). Joint BP retains the local channel correlation between the two Pauli components. This note compares joint BP with the four-state Pauli-label factor graph used for four-state BP. The two algorithms are shown to have the same posterior weights, messages, and beliefs after relabeling the four local Pauli states and marginalizing the irrelevant binary component.
summary: 对于CSS校正子解码，两个校验矩阵对两个泡利误差分量施加二进制奇偶校验约束。因此，后验可以写成一个二元因子图，其中两个 Tanner 图通过每个量子位的局部联合先验耦合。我们将这种因式分解的和积算法称为联合置信传播（联合BP）。联合BP保留了两个泡利分量之间的局部通道相关性。本文将联合 BP 与用于四状态 BP 的四状态保利标签因子图进行了比较。在重新标记四个局部泡利态并边缘化不相关的二元分量后，这两种算法被证明具有相同的后验权重、消息和置信度。

title: Entanglement-Rank Duality in Quadratic Phase Quantum States
abstract: Absolutely Maximally Entangled (AME) states are important resources in quantum information processing; however, a general systematic approach for constructing these states remains a formidable challenge. We identify a finite-field rank structure underlying multipartite entanglement in a class of quadratic-phase quantum states defined by symmetric matrices over $\mathbb{F}_p$. We prove an exact Rank-Purity Duality: the Rényi-2 purity of any subsystem is determined solely by the rank of the phase matrix. Within this ansatz, the existence of an AME state is equivalent to the existence of a generating phase matrix $P$ whose bipartition submatrices are of full rank, reducing the condition for maximal entanglement to a rank constraint on $P$. This establishes a direct correspondence between entanglement and cut-rank geometry in finite-field matrices. Furthermore, for square-free local dimensions, we show that the entanglement structure factorises via the Chinese Remainder Theorem into independent prime-field contributions, yielding an exact additive decomposition of Rényi-2 entropies. These results provide an algebraic characterisation of entanglement in the quadratic phase formalism and enable the systematic construction of highly entangled states.
summary:
绝对最大纠缠（AME）态是量子信息处理中的重要资源；然而，构建这些国家的总体系统方法仍然是一项艰巨的挑战。我们确定了由 $\mathbb{F}_p$ 上的对称矩阵定义的一类二次相量子态中多部分纠缠的有限场秩结构。我们证明了精确的秩-纯度对偶性：任何子系统的 Rényi-2 纯度仅由相位矩阵的秩决定。在这个 ansatz 中，AME 状态的存在等价于生成相位矩阵 $P$ 的存在，其二分子矩阵是满秩的，从而将最大纠缠的条件减少到 $P$ 的秩约束。这在有限场矩阵中的纠缠和割秩几何之间建立了直接对应关系。此外，对于无平方局部维度，我们表明纠缠结构通过中国剩余定理分解为独立的素域贡献，从而产生 Rényi-2 熵的精确加法分解。

这些结果提供了二次相形式中纠缠的代数表征，并使得能够系统地构造高度纠缠态。
